doc: v2.1.0 Phase E：bmesh / Geometry Nodes / 多部件装配模板库（10 个常用模板）。AI 调 apply_template(name, params) 时由 server.js 渲染参数到代码模板，再通过 exec_python 推到 Blender。每个模板都是【完整可执行的 bpy 脚本】，参数槽用 {{var}} 占位（Mustache 风格），未提供的参数取 default 值。

templates.name: sofa_3seater
templates.title: 三人沙发（5 部件装配 + Bevel + Subsurf）
templates.description: 建一个写实三人沙发：底座 + 靠背 + 左右扶手 + 3 个坐垫，靠背带 Bevel 圆角，坐垫上 Subsurf 软包效果。整体 join 成一个 Empty parent。

params.name: name
params.description: 沙发对象名（也用作集合名）

params.name: location
params.description: 沙发底中心放置位置（米），会贴地（Z=0）

templates.code:
import bpy, math
from mathutils import Vector

_NAME = {{name|json}}
_LOC = {{location|json}}
_COLOR = {{color|json}}
_LEN = float({{length}})
_DEP = float({{depth}})
_SEAT_H = float({{seat_height}})
_BACK_H = float({{back_height}})

# 主色材质
mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
mat.use_nodes = True
bsdf = mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF') or mat.node_tree.nodes.new('ShaderNodeBsdfPrincipled')
bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_COLOR[0], _COLOR[1], _COLOR[2], 1.0)
bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.7
bsdf.inputs['Metallic'].default_value = 0.0

parts = []
base_z = _SEAT_H * 0.5  # 底座中心

# 1. 底座 (cube 缩放)
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + base_z))
base = bpy.context.object; base.name = _NAME + '_base'
base.scale = (_LEN, _DEP, _SEAT_H)
bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
parts.append(base)

# 2. 靠背
back_thick = 0.18
back_h = _BACK_H - _SEAT_H
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] - _DEP * 0.5 + back_thick * 0.5, _LOC[2] + _SEAT_H + back_h * 0.5))
back = bpy.context.object; back.name = _NAME + '_back'
back.scale = (_LEN, back_thick, back_h)
bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
bev = back.modifiers.new('Bevel', 'BEVEL')
bev.affect = 'EDGES'; bev.width = 0.025; bev.segments = 3
parts.append(back)

# 3-4. 左右扶手
arm_w = 0.18
arm_h = _SEAT_H + 0.25
for side, sx in [('L', -1), ('R', 1)]:
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] + sx * (_LEN * 0.5 - arm_w * 0.5), _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + arm_h * 0.5))
    arm = bpy.context.object; arm.name = _NAME + '_arm_' + side
    arm.scale = (arm_w, _DEP, arm_h)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bev = arm.modifiers.new('Bevel', 'BEVEL')
    bev.affect = 'EDGES'; bev.width = 0.04; bev.segments = 3
    parts.append(arm)

# 5. 3 个坐垫
seat_y_offset = (back_thick - 0)
seat_w = (_LEN - 2 * arm_w - 0.04) / 3
for i, frac in enumerate([-1, 0, 1]):
    cx = _LOC[0] + frac * (seat_w + 0.01)
    cy = _LOC[1] + (back_thick * 0.5)
    cz = _LOC[2] + _SEAT_H + 0.07
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(cx, cy, cz))
    cu = bpy.context.object; cu.name = _NAME + '_cushion_' + str(i + 1)
    cu.scale = (seat_w * 0.97, _DEP - back_thick - 0.05, 0.14)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bev = cu.modifiers.new('Bevel', 'BEVEL')
    bev.affect = 'EDGES'; bev.width = 0.04; bev.segments = 4
    sub = cu.modifiers.new('Sub', 'SUBSURF')
    sub.levels = 2; sub.render_levels = 2
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    parts.append(cu)

# 共享材质
for p in parts:
    if not p.data.materials:
        p.data.materials.append(mat)
    else:
        p.data.materials[0] = mat

# 用 empty 作为整体 parent，方便后续整体移动
bpy.ops.object.empty_add(type='PLAIN_AXES', location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2]))
empty = bpy.context.object; empty.name = _NAME + '_root'
for p in parts:
    p.parent = empty
    p.matrix_parent_inverse = empty.matrix_world.inverted()

print('[apply_template] sofa_3seater 完成：' + str(len(parts)) + ' 部件 + 1 root empty')

templates.name: dining_chair
templates.title: 餐椅（5 部件：座面 + 靠背 + 4 椅腿）
templates.description: 经典木餐椅：1 座面 + 1 靠背 + 4 椅腿，靠背带细微 Bevel，整体 parent 到 Empty。

params.name: location
params.description: 椅子底中心放置位置（米）

templates.code:
import bpy, math
_NAME = {{name|json}}
_LOC = {{location|json}}
_COLOR = {{color|json}}
_SEAT = float({{seat_size}})
_SEAT_H = float({{seat_height}})
_BACK_H = float({{back_height}})
_LEG = float({{leg_thick}})

mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
mat.use_nodes = True
bsdf = mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF') or mat.node_tree.nodes.new('ShaderNodeBsdfPrincipled')
bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_COLOR[0], _COLOR[1], _COLOR[2], 1.0)
bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.55

parts = []

# 座面
seat_thick = 0.04
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _SEAT_H - seat_thick * 0.5))
seat = bpy.context.object; seat.name = _NAME + '_seat'
seat.scale = (_SEAT, _SEAT, seat_thick)
bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
bev = seat.modifiers.new('Bevel', 'BEVEL')
bev.affect = 'EDGES'; bev.width = 0.008; bev.segments = 2
parts.append(seat)

# 靠背
back_thick = 0.03
back_h = _BACK_H - _SEAT_H
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] - _SEAT * 0.5 + back_thick * 0.5, _LOC[2] + _SEAT_H + back_h * 0.5))
back = bpy.context.object; back.name = _NAME + '_back'
back.scale = (_SEAT, back_thick, back_h)
bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
bev = back.modifiers.new('Bevel', 'BEVEL')
bev.affect = 'EDGES'; bev.width = 0.01; bev.segments = 2
parts.append(back)

# 4 椅腿
leg_h = _SEAT_H - seat_thick
for i, (sx, sy) in enumerate([(-1, -1), (1, -1), (-1, 1), (1, 1)]):
    cx = _LOC[0] + sx * (_SEAT * 0.5 - _LEG * 0.5)
    cy = _LOC[1] + sy * (_SEAT * 0.5 - _LEG * 0.5)
    cz = _LOC[2] + leg_h * 0.5
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(cx, cy, cz))
    leg = bpy.context.object; leg.name = _NAME + '_leg_' + str(i + 1)
    leg.scale = (_LEG, _LEG, leg_h)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    parts.append(leg)

for p in parts:
    if not p.data.materials:
        p.data.materials.append(mat)
    else:
        p.data.materials[0] = mat

bpy.ops.object.empty_add(type='PLAIN_AXES', location=_LOC)
root = bpy.context.object; root.name = _NAME + '_root'
for p in parts:
    p.parent = root; p.matrix_parent_inverse = root.matrix_world.inverted()

print('[apply_template] dining_chair 完成：' + str(len(parts)) + ' 部件')

templates.name: coffee_table_round
templates.title: 圆形茶几（桌面 + 4 桌腿 Array）
templates.description: 圆形咖啡桌：cylinder 桌面 + 一根桌腿 + Array(4) + Empty offset 旋转 90°，节约面数 + 完美对称。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
_NAME = {{name|json}}
_LOC = {{location|json}}
_COLOR = {{color|json}}
_R = float({{radius}})
_H = float({{table_h}})
_TOP = float({{top_thick}})

mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
mat.use_nodes = True
bsdf = mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF') or mat.node_tree.nodes.new('ShaderNodeBsdfPrincipled')
bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_COLOR[0], _COLOR[1], _COLOR[2], 1.0)
bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.4

parts = []
# 桌面（cylinder）
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=_R, depth=_TOP, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H - _TOP * 0.5), vertices=64)
top = bpy.context.object; top.name = _NAME + '_top'
bev = top.modifiers.new('Bevel', 'BEVEL')
bev.affect = 'EDGES'; bev.width = 0.005; bev.segments = 2
bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
parts.append(top)

# 1 根桌腿（cylinder） + Array 旋转复制
leg_h = _H - _TOP
leg_off = _R * 0.7
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.022, depth=leg_h, location=(_LOC[0] + leg_off, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + leg_h * 0.5), vertices=24)
leg = bpy.context.object; leg.name = _NAME + '_leg'
bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
parts.append(leg)

# Empty 作为 Array 的 OBJECT_OFFSET（绕 Z 轴旋转 90°）
bpy.ops.object.empty_add(type='PLAIN_AXES', location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2]))
emp = bpy.context.object; emp.name = _NAME + '_array_offset'
emp.rotation_euler = (0, 0, math.radians(90))

leg.select_set(True); bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = leg
arr = leg.modifiers.new('Array', 'ARRAY')
arr.use_relative_offset = False
arr.use_object_offset = True
arr.offset_object = emp
arr.count = 4

# 全部用同一个 mat
for p in parts:
    if not p.data.materials:
        p.data.materials.append(mat)
    else:
        p.data.materials[0] = mat

# Parent 到 root empty
bpy.ops.object.empty_add(type='PLAIN_AXES', location=_LOC)
root = bpy.context.object; root.name = _NAME + '_root'
for p in parts + [emp]:
    p.parent = root; p.matrix_parent_inverse = root.matrix_world.inverted()

print('[apply_template] coffee_table_round 完成：1 桌面 + 1 桌腿×Array(4) + 1 root empty')

templates.name: vase_spin
templates.title: 花瓶（bmesh.spin 旋转扫掠）
templates.description: 用 bmesh.ops.spin 把一条剖面线绕 Z 轴扫一圈生成花瓶。剖面参数化（高度 + 中段腰部缩放 + 颈部缩放），曲面 Smooth + Subsurf。

params.name: neck_scale
params.description: 颈部相对最大半径的缩放（0~1）

templates.code:
import bpy, bmesh, math
from mathutils import Vector
_NAME = {{name|json}}
_LOC = {{location|json}}
_COLOR = {{color|json}}
_H = float({{height}})
_R = float({{max_radius}})
_NECK = float({{neck_scale}})
_SEG = int({{segments}})

# 1. 用 bmesh 写剖面线（沿 Z 轴）
bm = bmesh.new()
N = 24  # 剖面采样数
verts = []
for i in range(N + 1):
    t = i / N
    # 剖面 radius 包络：底→腰→颈→口（钟形）
    if t < 0.15:        r = _R * (0.55 + t / 0.15 * 0.30)
    elif t < 0.55:      r = _R * (0.85 + (t - 0.15) / 0.40 * 0.15)   # 腰部最大
    elif t < 0.85:      r = _R * (1.00 - (t - 0.55) / 0.30 * (1 - _NECK))
    else:               r = _R * (_NECK + (t - 0.85) / 0.15 * 0.10)
    z = t * _H
    v = bm.verts.new((r, 0, z))
    verts.append(v)
bm.verts.ensure_lookup_table()
# 在剖面顶点之间建边
for i in range(N):
    bm.edges.new((verts[i], verts[i + 1]))

# 2. spin 旋转 360°
import math as _math
bmesh.ops.spin(bm, geom=bm.verts[:] + bm.edges[:], cent=(0, 0, 0), axis=(0, 0, 1), dvec=(0, 0, 0), angle=_math.radians(360), steps=_SEG, use_duplicate=False)
bmesh.ops.remove_doubles(bm, verts=bm.verts, dist=0.0005)
bmesh.ops.recalc_face_normals(bm, faces=bm.faces)

me = bpy.data.meshes.new(_NAME)
bm.to_mesh(me); bm.free()
obj = bpy.data.objects.new(_NAME, me)
bpy.context.collection.objects.link(obj)
obj.location = _LOC

# Smooth + Subsurf
bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = obj; obj.select_set(True)
bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
sub = obj.modifiers.new('Sub', 'SUBSURF'); sub.levels = 2; sub.render_levels = 2

# 材质
mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
mat.use_nodes = True
bsdf = mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF') or mat.node_tree.nodes.new('ShaderNodeBsdfPrincipled')
bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_COLOR[0], _COLOR[1], _COLOR[2], 1.0)
bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.25
bsdf.inputs['IOR'].default_value = 1.5
obj.data.materials.append(mat)

print('[apply_template] vase_spin 完成：1 个 spin 旋转扫掠对象（' + str(_SEG) + ' 段）')

templates.name: cup_inset
templates.title: 杯子（圆柱 + bmesh.inset_individual 挖空 + Subsurf）
templates.description: 圆柱挤出当杯身，顶面用 bmesh.inset_individual 内插再下压形成杯口空腔，最后 Subsurf 平滑边角。
templates.code:
import bpy, bmesh, math
_NAME = {{name|json}}
_LOC = {{location|json}}
_COLOR = {{color|json}}
_H = float({{height}})
_R = float({{radius}})
_W = float({{wall_thick}})

bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=_R, depth=_H, vertices=32, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H * 0.5))
obj = bpy.context.object; obj.name = _NAME
bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()

# Edit mode 进 bmesh
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bm = bmesh.from_edit_mesh(obj.data)
bm.faces.ensure_lookup_table()
# 找顶面（法线 z 接近 1）
top_faces = [f for f in bm.faces if f.normal.z > 0.9]
bmesh.ops.inset_individual(bm, faces=top_faces, thickness=_W, depth=0.0, use_even_offset=True)
# 取新内部面（依然朝上 + 小一圈）
bm.faces.ensure_lookup_table()
inner_top = [f for f in bm.faces if f.normal.z > 0.9 and abs(f.calc_center_median().z - _H) < 0.001]
bmesh.ops.translate(bm, verts=list({v for f in inner_top for v in f.verts}), vec=(0, 0, -(_H - _W * 2)))
bmesh.update_edit_mesh(obj.data)
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

sub = obj.modifiers.new('Sub', 'SUBSURF'); sub.levels = 2; sub.render_levels = 3

mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
mat.use_nodes = True
bsdf = mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF') or mat.node_tree.nodes.new('ShaderNodeBsdfPrincipled')
bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_COLOR[0], _COLOR[1], _COLOR[2], 1.0)
bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.2
obj.data.materials.append(mat)
print('[apply_template] cup_inset 完成：杯口已用 inset_individual 挖空')

templates.name: plant_geonode
templates.title: 盆栽（Geometry Nodes 程序化叶子散布）
templates.description: 建一个 cylinder 花盆 + 一段曲线茎，用 Geometry Nodes 在曲线上散布叶子实例。叶子是简单的扁平 plane，由 Distribute Points + Instance on Points 散布。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
from mathutils import Vector
_NAME = {{name|json}}
_LOC = {{location|json}}
_PCOL = {{pot_color|json}}
_LCOL = {{leaf_color|json}}
_PR = float({{pot_radius}})
_PH = float({{pot_height}})
_LC = int({{leaf_count}})

# 1. 花盆
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=_PR, depth=_PH, vertices=32, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _PH * 0.5))
pot = bpy.context.object; pot.name = _NAME + '_pot'
bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
mat_pot = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_pot_mat')
mat_pot.use_nodes = True
bsdf = mat_pot.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF') or mat_pot.node_tree.nodes.new('ShaderNodeBsdfPrincipled')
bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_PCOL[0], _PCOL[1], _PCOL[2], 1.0)
bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.85
pot.data.materials.append(mat_pot)

# 2. 叶子原型（一个椭圆 plane）
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=0.06, location=(_LOC[0] + 5, _LOC[1] + 5, 0))   # 放远一点不显示
leaf = bpy.context.object; leaf.name = _NAME + '_leaf_proto'
leaf.scale = (1.5, 0.7, 1.0)
bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
leaf.hide_render = True
leaf.hide_viewport = True
mat_leaf = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_leaf_mat')
mat_leaf.use_nodes = True
bsdf2 = mat_leaf.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF') or mat_leaf.node_tree.nodes.new('ShaderNodeBsdfPrincipled')
bsdf2.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_LCOL[0], _LCOL[1], _LCOL[2], 1.0)
bsdf2.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.6
leaf.data.materials.append(mat_leaf)

# 3. 茎（cylinder） + Geometry Nodes 散布叶子
stem_h = 0.30
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.005, depth=stem_h, vertices=12, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _PH + stem_h * 0.5))
stem = bpy.context.object; stem.name = _NAME + '_stem'
bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
stem.data.materials.append(mat_leaf)

# 一个简单的 GN 树：散点（在 stem 上）→ 实例化 leaf
mod = stem.modifiers.new('GN', 'NODES')
nt = bpy.data.node_groups.new(_NAME + '_GN', 'GeometryNodeTree')
mod.node_group = nt
# 4.x 接口声明
nt.interface.new_socket('Geometry', in_out='INPUT',  socket_type='NodeSocketGeometry')
nt.interface.new_socket('Geometry', in_out='OUTPUT', socket_type='NodeSocketGeometry')
g_in  = nt.nodes.new('NodeGroupInput'); g_in.location = (-600, 0)
g_out = nt.nodes.new('NodeGroupOutput'); g_out.location = (600, 0)

dp = nt.nodes.new('GeometryNodeDistributePointsOnFaces'); dp.location = (-300, 0)
dp.inputs['Density'].default_value = float(_LC) * 50.0
ip = nt.nodes.new('GeometryNodeInstanceOnPoints'); ip.location = (-50, 0)
rand_rot = nt.nodes.new('FunctionNodeRandomValue'); rand_rot.location = (-300, -200); rand_rot.data_type = 'FLOAT_VECTOR'
rand_rot.inputs['Min'].default_value = (-0.5, -0.5, -math.pi)
rand_rot.inputs['Max'].default_value = (0.5, 0.5, math.pi)
rand_sc = nt.nodes.new('FunctionNodeRandomValue'); rand_sc.location = (-300, -400); rand_sc.data_type = 'FLOAT'
rand_sc.inputs['Min'].default_value = 0.7
rand_sc.inputs['Max'].default_value = 1.3
oi = nt.nodes.new('GeometryNodeObjectInfo'); oi.location = (-300, 200)
oi.inputs['Object'].default_value = leaf
ri = nt.nodes.new('GeometryNodeRealizeInstances'); ri.location = (200, 0)
join = nt.nodes.new('GeometryNodeJoinGeometry'); join.location = (380, 0)

nt.links.new(g_in.outputs['Geometry'], dp.inputs['Mesh'])
nt.links.new(dp.outputs['Points'], ip.inputs['Points'])
nt.links.new(oi.outputs['Geometry'], ip.inputs['Instance'])
nt.links.new(rand_rot.outputs['Value'], ip.inputs['Rotation'])
nt.links.new(rand_sc.outputs['Value'], ip.inputs['Scale'])
nt.links.new(ip.outputs['Instances'], ri.inputs['Geometry'])
nt.links.new(g_in.outputs['Geometry'], join.inputs['Geometry'])
nt.links.new(ri.outputs['Geometry'], join.inputs['Geometry'])
nt.links.new(join.outputs['Geometry'], g_out.inputs['Geometry'])

# Parent
bpy.ops.object.empty_add(type='PLAIN_AXES', location=_LOC)
root = bpy.context.object; root.name = _NAME + '_root'
for p in [pot, stem, leaf]:
    p.parent = root; p.matrix_parent_inverse = root.matrix_world.inverted()

print('[apply_template] plant_geonode 完成：花盆 + 茎 + 程序化叶子（GN 散布）')

templates.name: bookshelf_array
templates.title: 书架（侧板 + Array 隔板）
templates.description: 两侧板 + 一块隔板用 Array modifier 沿 Z 轴等距复制 5~7 块，再加 顶/底封板。
templates.code:
import bpy
_NAME = {{name|json}}
_LOC = {{location|json}}
_COLOR = {{color|json}}
_W = float({{width}})
_D = float({{depth}})
_H = float({{height}})
_SC = int({{shelf_count}})
_PT = float({{panel_thick}})

mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
mat.use_nodes = True
bsdf = mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF') or mat.node_tree.nodes.new('ShaderNodeBsdfPrincipled')
bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_COLOR[0], _COLOR[1], _COLOR[2], 1.0)
bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.6

parts = []
# 左右侧板
for side, sx in [('L', -1), ('R', 1)]:
    cx = _LOC[0] + sx * (_W * 0.5 - _PT * 0.5)
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(cx, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H * 0.5))
    s = bpy.context.object; s.name = _NAME + '_side_' + side
    s.scale = (_PT, _D, _H)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    parts.append(s)

# 顶 / 底 封板
for lab, sz in [('bottom', _PT * 0.5), ('top', _H - _PT * 0.5)]:
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + sz))
    p = bpy.context.object; p.name = _NAME + '_' + lab
    p.scale = (_W - 2 * _PT - 0.001, _D, _PT)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    parts.append(p)

# 一块隔板 + Array
span = (_H - 2 * _PT) / (_SC + 1)   # 等距间隔
base_z = _LOC[2] + _PT + span
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], base_z))
sh = bpy.context.object; sh.name = _NAME + '_shelf'
sh.scale = (_W - 2 * _PT - 0.001, _D, _PT)
bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
arr = sh.modifiers.new('Array', 'ARRAY')
arr.use_relative_offset = False
arr.use_constant_offset = True
arr.constant_offset_displace = (0, 0, span)
arr.count = _SC
parts.append(sh)

for p in parts:
    if not p.data.materials:
        p.data.materials.append(mat)
    else:
        p.data.materials[0] = mat

bpy.ops.object.empty_add(type='PLAIN_AXES', location=_LOC)
root = bpy.context.object; root.name = _NAME + '_root'
for p in parts:
    p.parent = root; p.matrix_parent_inverse = root.matrix_world.inverted()

print('[apply_template] bookshelf_array 完成：侧板×2 + 顶/底封板 + 隔板 Array(' + str(_SC) + ')')

templates.name: frame_bevel
templates.title: 画框（外框 Bevel + 内嵌画面）
templates.description: 外框 cube + 4 边斜切 + Bevel 圆角，内嵌一块薄 plane 当画面（参数化贴图路径，省略时纯色）。

params.name: location
params.description: 画框中心（通常贴墙挂高 1.5m）

params.name: image_path
params.description: 可选：贴图文件绝对路径（空则用纯色）

templates.code:
import bpy
_NAME = {{name|json}}
_LOC = {{location|json}}
_FCOL = {{frame_color|json}}
_ICOL = {{image_color|json}}
_W = float({{width}})
_H = float({{height}})
_FW = float({{frame_w}})
_D = float({{depth}})
_IMG = {{image_path|json}}

# 画框（外框 cube 上挖个 boolean 洞太麻烦，用 4 根边拼）
frame_parts = []
# 上下两横（X 方向长，y 方向窄）
for y_sign in [-1, 1]:
    cz = _LOC[2] + y_sign * (_H * 0.5 - _FW * 0.5)
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], cz))
    p = bpy.context.object; p.name = _NAME + '_h' + ('+' if y_sign > 0 else '-')
    p.scale = (_W, _D, _FW)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    frame_parts.append(p)
# 左右两竖
for x_sign in [-1, 1]:
    cx = _LOC[0] + x_sign * (_W * 0.5 - _FW * 0.5)
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(cx, _LOC[1], _LOC[2]))
    p = bpy.context.object; p.name = _NAME + '_v' + ('+' if x_sign > 0 else '-')
    p.scale = (_FW, _D, _H - 2 * _FW + 0.001)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    frame_parts.append(p)

frame_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_frame_mat')
frame_mat.use_nodes = True
bsdf = frame_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF') or frame_mat.node_tree.nodes.new('ShaderNodeBsdfPrincipled')
bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_FCOL[0], _FCOL[1], _FCOL[2], 1.0)
bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.4
for p in frame_parts:
    p.data.materials.append(frame_mat)
    bev = p.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bev.affect = 'EDGES'; bev.width = 0.005; bev.segments = 2

# 画面 plane
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] + _D * 0.45, _LOC[2]))
img = bpy.context.object; img.name = _NAME + '_image'
img.rotation_euler = (1.5707963267948966, 0, 0)   # 90° X 朝外
img.scale = (_W - 2 * _FW, _H - 2 * _FW, 1)
bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=True)
img_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_image_mat')
img_mat.use_nodes = True
bsdf2 = img_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF') or img_mat.node_tree.nodes.new('ShaderNodeBsdfPrincipled')
bsdf2.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_ICOL[0], _ICOL[1], _ICOL[2], 1.0)
bsdf2.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.35
if _IMG:
    try:
        tex = img_mat.node_tree.nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexImage')
        tex.image = bpy.data.images.load(_IMG)
        img_mat.node_tree.links.new(tex.outputs['Color'], bsdf2.inputs['Base Color'])
    except Exception as e:
        print('[apply_template] frame_bevel 图片加载失败：' + str(e) + '（用纯色兜底）')
img.data.materials.append(img_mat)

bpy.ops.object.empty_add(type='PLAIN_AXES', location=_LOC)
root = bpy.context.object; root.name = _NAME + '_root'
for p in frame_parts + [img]:
    p.parent = root; p.matrix_parent_inverse = root.matrix_world.inverted()

print('[apply_template] frame_bevel 完成：4 边外框 + 1 画面 plane')

templates.name: terrain_displace
templates.title: 崎岖地面（Plane subdivide + Displace Voronoi）
templates.description: 大面积 plane subdivide 100×100 + Displace Voronoi 噪波位移 + Subsurf 平滑 + 岩石/草地 PBR 材质。AI 反复造不出复杂地面的根本药。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _SIZE = float({{size}})
    _SUB = int({{subdiv}})
    _STR = float({{strength}})
    _TS = float({{tex_scale}})
    _COL = {{color|json}}
    _KIND = {{kind|json}}

    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=_SIZE, location=_LOC)
    obj = bpy.context.object; obj.name = _NAME
    # subdivide
    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
    bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
    cuts = max(1, min(_SUB, 200))
    # 分批 subdivide（一次太多会卡）
    while cuts > 50:
        bpy.ops.mesh.subdivide(number_cuts=50)
        cuts -= 50
    if cuts > 0:
        bpy.ops.mesh.subdivide(number_cuts=cuts)
    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

    # Voronoi 噪波纹理 + Displace
    tex = bpy.data.textures.new(_NAME + '_disp_tex', 'VORONOI')
    tex.noise_scale = max(0.05, _SIZE / max(1.0, _TS) / 10.0)
    tex.distance_metric = 'DISTANCE_SQUARED'
    dm = obj.modifiers.new('Displace', 'DISPLACE')
    dm.texture = tex
    dm.strength = _STR
    dm.mid_level = 0.5
    # 第二层 Noise 让细节更碎
    tex2 = bpy.data.textures.new(_NAME + '_disp2', 'CLOUDS')
    tex2.noise_scale = 0.5
    dm2 = obj.modifiers.new('Displace2', 'DISPLACE')
    dm2.texture = tex2
    dm2.strength = _STR * 0.3

    sub = obj.modifiers.new('Sub', 'SUBSURF')
    sub.levels = 1; sub.render_levels = 2
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()

    # 材质（按 kind 选色）
    color_map = {'grass': (0.18, 0.45, 0.15), 'sand': (0.85, 0.75, 0.55), 'snow': (0.92, 0.94, 0.97), 'rocky': tuple(_COL)}
    base_c = color_map.get(_KIND, tuple(_COL))
    mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
    mat.use_nodes = True
    nt = mat.node_tree
    bsdf = nt.nodes.get('Principled BSDF') or nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeBsdfPrincipled')
    if 'Base Color' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (base_c[0], base_c[1], base_c[2], 1.0)
    if 'Roughness' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.85 if _KIND != 'snow' else 0.5
    # 噪波着色（土地有色差）
    noise = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexNoise')
    noise.inputs['Scale'].default_value = 8.0
    cr = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeValToRGB')
    cr.color_ramp.elements[0].color = (base_c[0]*0.7, base_c[1]*0.7, base_c[2]*0.7, 1)
    cr.color_ramp.elements[1].color = (base_c[0]*1.15, base_c[1]*1.15, base_c[2]*1.15, 1)
    nt.links.new(noise.outputs['Fac'], cr.inputs['Fac'])
    nt.links.new(cr.outputs['Color'], bsdf.inputs['Base Color'])
    obj.data.materials.append(mat)
    print('[apply_template] terrain_displace 完成: ' + _NAME + ' size=' + str(_SIZE) + 'm subdiv=' + str(_SUB) + ' kind=' + _KIND)
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] terrain_displace 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: mountain_layered
templates.title: 远景分层山脉（多层 Plane + Displace + 透视错位）
templates.description: 用 3 层渐变颜色的 Plane（subdivide + Displace Noise）按 Y 方向远近排列，做背景远山。靠雾色叠色营造层次感。

params.name: base_color
params.description: 最近山脉色（远山会渐变成天空色）

templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _N = max(2, min(int({{layers}}), 4))
    _W = float({{width}})
    _MH = float({{max_height}})
    _BC = {{base_color|json}}

    parts = []
    for i in range(_N):
        t = i / max(1, _N - 1)
        y_off = i * (_W * 0.15)
        h = _MH * (1.0 - t * 0.5)
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=_W, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] + y_off, _LOC[2]))
        m = bpy.context.object; m.name = _NAME + '_layer' + str(i + 1)
        m.rotation_euler = (math.radians(90), 0, 0)
        m.scale = (1.0, h / _W, 1.0)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=True)
        # subdivide
        bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
        bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
        bpy.ops.mesh.subdivide(number_cuts=30)
        bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')
        tex = bpy.data.textures.new(_NAME + '_t' + str(i), 'CLOUDS')
        tex.noise_scale = 1.5
        dm = m.modifiers.new('Displace', 'DISPLACE')
        dm.texture = tex
        dm.strength = h * 1.5
        dm.direction = 'Y'
        # 颜色：越远越偏蓝灰（雾色）
        c = (_BC[0] * (1 - t) + 0.65 * t, _BC[1] * (1 - t) + 0.72 * t, _BC[2] * (1 - t) + 0.80 * t)
        mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_m' + str(i))
        mat.use_nodes = True
        bsdf = mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
        if bsdf and 'Base Color' in bsdf.inputs:
            bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (c[0], c[1], c[2], 1.0)
        if bsdf and 'Roughness' in bsdf.inputs:
            bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.95
        m.data.materials.append(mat)
        parts.append(m)
    print('[apply_template] mountain_layered 完成: ' + str(len(parts)) + ' 层远山')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] mountain_layered 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: volumetric_clouds
templates.title: 体积云朵（Cube domain + Principled Volume + Noise）
templates.description: 用一个大 Cube domain + Principled Volume + Noise + ColorRamp 形成蓬松云朵效果。Cycles 必备，EEVEE Next 也支持体积。

params.name: size
params.description: 云层 domain 边长 X/Y

params.name: tex_scale
params.description: Noise 缩放（越大云越细碎）

templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _S = float({{size}})
    _T = float({{thickness}})
    _D = float({{density}})
    _TS = float({{tex_scale}})

    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=_LOC)
    obj = bpy.context.object; obj.name = _NAME
    obj.scale = (_S, _S, _T)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    obj.display_type = 'WIRE'   # 视口里 domain 显示成线框
    obj.hide_render = False

    mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_vol_mat')
    mat.use_nodes = True
    nt = mat.node_tree
    # 清空默认节点
    for n in list(nt.nodes):
        nt.nodes.remove(n)
    out = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeOutputMaterial'); out.location = (600, 0)
    pv = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeVolumePrincipled'); pv.location = (300, 0)
    if 'Density' in pv.inputs:
        pv.inputs['Density'].default_value = _D
    if 'Anisotropy' in pv.inputs:
        pv.inputs['Anisotropy'].default_value = 0.3
    if 'Color' in pv.inputs:
        pv.inputs['Color'].default_value = (1.0, 1.0, 1.0, 1.0)
    # Noise → ColorRamp → Density 接入
    coord = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexCoord'); coord.location = (-700, 0)
    map_n = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeMapping'); map_n.location = (-500, 0)
    map_n.inputs['Scale'].default_value = (_TS, _TS, _TS)
    noise = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexNoise'); noise.location = (-300, 0)
    noise.inputs['Scale'].default_value = 2.0
    noise.inputs['Detail'].default_value = 4.0
    noise.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.7
    cr = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeValToRGB'); cr.location = (0, 0)
    cr.color_ramp.elements[0].position = 0.4
    cr.color_ramp.elements[0].color = (0, 0, 0, 1)
    cr.color_ramp.elements[1].position = 0.7
    cr.color_ramp.elements[1].color = (1, 1, 1, 1)
    nt.links.new(coord.outputs['Generated'], map_n.inputs['Vector'])
    nt.links.new(map_n.outputs['Vector'], noise.inputs['Vector'])
    nt.links.new(noise.outputs['Fac'], cr.inputs['Fac'])
    nt.links.new(cr.outputs['Color'], pv.inputs['Density'])
    nt.links.new(pv.outputs['Volume'], out.inputs['Volume'])
    obj.data.materials.append(mat)
    print('[apply_template] volumetric_clouds 完成: domain ' + str(_S) + 'x' + str(_S) + 'x' + str(_T))
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] volumetric_clouds 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: sky_nishita
templates.title: 真实大气天空（World Sky NISHITA + 5 个时段预设）
templates.description: 替换 World 的环境为 ShaderNodeTexSky（sky_type='NISHITA' 真实瑞利散射），time_preset 可选 noon/sunset/dawn/dusk/night。是『二次元蓝天』的标准答案。

params.name: time_preset
params.description: 时段：noon（正午）/ sunset（黄昏）/ dawn（黎明）/ dusk（傍晚）/ night（夜空，月光）

templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _PRESET = {{time_preset|json}}
    _STR = float({{strength}})
    _ROT = float({{sun_rotation}})

    # NISHITA 是 ShaderNodeTexSky 的 sky_type 枚举，合法值仅限 NISHITA / PREETHAM / HOSEK_WILKIE
    # 不要把 NISHITA 塞到 phase_function（那是其它东西的）
    presets = {
        'noon':   {'elev': 60.0,  'intensity': 1.0, 'air': 1.0, 'dust': 1.0,  'ozone': 1.0, 'strength_mul': 1.0},
        'sunset': {'elev': 5.0,   'intensity': 0.7, 'air': 1.0, 'dust': 4.0,  'ozone': 1.0, 'strength_mul': 0.8},
        'dawn':   {'elev': 3.0,   'intensity': 0.5, 'air': 1.0, 'dust': 3.0,  'ozone': 1.0, 'strength_mul': 0.6},
        'dusk':   {'elev': -2.0,  'intensity': 0.3, 'air': 1.0, 'dust': 2.0,  'ozone': 1.0, 'strength_mul': 0.4},
        'night':  {'elev': -25.0, 'intensity': 0.0, 'air': 1.0, 'dust': 1.0,  'ozone': 1.0, 'strength_mul': 0.05}
    }
    p = presets.get(_PRESET, presets['noon'])

    world = bpy.context.scene.world
    if not world:
        world = bpy.data.worlds.new('World')
        bpy.context.scene.world = world
    world.use_nodes = True
    nt = world.node_tree
    # 清空老节点
    for n in list(nt.nodes):
        nt.nodes.remove(n)
    out = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeOutputWorld'); out.location = (400, 0)
    bg = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeBackground'); bg.location = (200, 0)
    bg.inputs['Strength'].default_value = _STR * p['strength_mul']
    sky = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexSky'); sky.location = (-100, 0)
    sky.sky_type = 'NISHITA'   # ★ 正确枚举值
    try:
        sky.sun_elevation = math.radians(p['elev'])
        sky.sun_rotation = math.radians(_ROT)
        sky.sun_intensity = p['intensity']
        sky.air_density = p['air']
        sky.dust_density = p['dust']
        sky.ozone_density = p['ozone']
    except AttributeError as _ae:
        print('[sky_nishita] 部分属性不存在（可能 Blender 版本旧）:', _ae)
    nt.links.new(sky.outputs['Color'], bg.inputs['Color'])
    nt.links.new(bg.outputs['Background'], out.inputs['Surface'])

    # 夜空兜底：叠一个深蓝色
    if _PRESET == 'night':
        bg.inputs['Color'].default_value = (0.02, 0.04, 0.10, 1.0)
        # 把 sky 节点的输出断开（避免还是亮的）
        for ln in list(nt.links):
            if ln.from_node == sky:
                nt.links.remove(ln)
    print('[apply_template] sky_nishita 完成: preset=' + _PRESET + ' elev=' + str(p['elev']) + '°')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] sky_nishita 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: fog_volume
templates.title: 体积雾（地面层 Cube domain + Volume Scatter）
templates.description: 在地面 0~3m 范围内放一个大 Cube domain，里面填 Volume Scatter（白色低密度），制造神社夜景/晨雾的丁达尔效果。

templates.name: water_plane
templates.title: 水面（Plane + Subsurf + Wave 法线扰动 + Transmission）
templates.description: Plane 高细分 + Wave Texture 接 Normal，BSDF Transmission=1 / IOR=1.33 / Roughness=0.05。湖面/海面/水池都靠它。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _S = float({{size}})
    _C = {{color|json}}
    _WS = float({{wave_scale}})

    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=_S, location=_LOC)
    obj = bpy.context.object; obj.name = _NAME
    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
    bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
    bpy.ops.mesh.subdivide(number_cuts=20)
    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

    mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_water_mat')
    mat.use_nodes = True
    nt = mat.node_tree
    bsdf = nt.nodes.get('Principled BSDF') or nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeBsdfPrincipled')
    if 'Base Color' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_C[0], _C[1], _C[2], 1.0)
    if 'Roughness' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.05
    # 4.x: 'Transmission Weight' / 老版本: 'Transmission'
    for key in ['Transmission Weight', 'Transmission']:
        if key in bsdf.inputs:
            bsdf.inputs[key].default_value = 1.0
            break
    if 'IOR' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['IOR'].default_value = 1.33
    # Wave → Bump → BSDF Normal
    wave = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexWave')
    wave.wave_type = 'BANDS'
    wave.inputs['Scale'].default_value = _WS
    wave.inputs['Distortion'].default_value = 3.0
    bump = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeBump')
    bump.inputs['Strength'].default_value = 0.1
    nt.links.new(wave.outputs['Fac'], bump.inputs['Height'])
    if 'Normal' in bsdf.inputs:
        nt.links.new(bump.outputs['Normal'], bsdf.inputs['Normal'])
    obj.data.materials.append(mat)
    print('[apply_template] water_plane 完成: ' + str(_S) + 'm × ' + str(_S) + 'm')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] water_plane 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: waterfall
templates.title: 瀑布（Plane + 半透明水材质 + 粒子细线）
templates.description: 竖直 Plane（带 Wave Distortion）+ 半透白水材质，下方加一个雾团 Cube 模拟水花。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _W = float({{width}})
    _H = float({{height}})

    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H * 0.5))
    fall = bpy.context.object; fall.name = _NAME
    fall.rotation_euler = (math.radians(90), 0, 0)
    fall.scale = (_W, _H, 1.0)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=True)
    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
    bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
    bpy.ops.mesh.subdivide(number_cuts=8)
    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

    mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
    mat.use_nodes = True
    bsdf = mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bsdf:
        if 'Base Color' in bsdf.inputs:
            bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.85, 0.92, 1.0, 1.0)
        if 'Roughness' in bsdf.inputs:
            bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.15
        for key in ['Transmission Weight', 'Transmission']:
            if key in bsdf.inputs:
                bsdf.inputs[key].default_value = 0.7
                break
    mat.blend_method = 'BLEND' if hasattr(mat, 'blend_method') else 'BLEND'
    fall.data.materials.append(mat)

    # 底部水花团
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_uv_sphere_add(radius=_W * 0.6, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + 0.1))
    mist = bpy.context.object; mist.name = _NAME + '_mist'
    mist.scale = (1.5, 1.5, 0.4)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    mat2 = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mist_mat')
    mat2.use_nodes = True
    b2 = mat2.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b2:
        if 'Base Color' in b2.inputs:
            b2.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (1.0, 1.0, 1.0, 1.0)
        if 'Alpha' in b2.inputs:
            b2.inputs['Alpha'].default_value = 0.3
    mat2.blend_method = 'BLEND'
    mist.data.materials.append(mat2)
    print('[apply_template] waterfall 完成: ' + str(_W) + 'm × ' + str(_H) + 'm + 水花')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] waterfall 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: grass_field
templates.title: 草地（Plane + GN Distribute Points + Instance grass blade）
templates.description: 底部 Plane + Geometry Nodes 散布草叶实例（小 plane 加 Cone scaled）。AI 反复造不出草地的根本药。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _S = float({{size}})
    _D = float({{density}})
    _C = {{color|json}}
    _BH = float({{blade_height}})

    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=_S, location=_LOC)
    ground = bpy.context.object; ground.name = _NAME + '_ground'
    g_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_ground_mat')
    g_mat.use_nodes = True
    bsdf = g_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bsdf and 'Base Color' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_C[0] * 0.7, _C[1] * 0.7, _C[2] * 0.7, 1.0)
    if bsdf and 'Roughness' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.95
    ground.data.materials.append(g_mat)

    # 草叶 proto（cone 倒立）
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cone_add(radius1=0.01, radius2=0.0, depth=_BH, vertices=4, location=(_LOC[0] + 100, 0, 0))
    blade = bpy.context.object; blade.name = _NAME + '_blade'
    blade.hide_render = True
    blade.hide_viewport = True
    b_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_blade_mat')
    b_mat.use_nodes = True
    bsdf2 = b_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bsdf2 and 'Base Color' in bsdf2.inputs:
        bsdf2.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_C[0], _C[1], _C[2], 1.0)
    if bsdf2 and 'Roughness' in bsdf2.inputs:
        bsdf2.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.85
    blade.data.materials.append(b_mat)

    mod = ground.modifiers.new('GN_Grass', 'NODES')
    nt = bpy.data.node_groups.new(_NAME + '_GN', 'GeometryNodeTree')
    mod.node_group = nt
    try:
        nt.interface.new_socket('Geometry', in_out='INPUT', socket_type='NodeSocketGeometry')
        nt.interface.new_socket('Geometry', in_out='OUTPUT', socket_type='NodeSocketGeometry')
    except Exception:
        pass
    g_in = nt.nodes.new('NodeGroupInput'); g_in.location = (-800, 0)
    g_out = nt.nodes.new('NodeGroupOutput'); g_out.location = (800, 0)
    dp = nt.nodes.new('GeometryNodeDistributePointsOnFaces'); dp.location = (-500, 0)
    if 'Density' in dp.inputs:
        dp.inputs['Density'].default_value = _D
    ip = nt.nodes.new('GeometryNodeInstanceOnPoints'); ip.location = (-200, 0)
    oi = nt.nodes.new('GeometryNodeObjectInfo'); oi.location = (-500, 200)
    oi.inputs['Object'].default_value = blade
    rand_rot = nt.nodes.new('FunctionNodeRandomValue'); rand_rot.location = (-500, -200)
    rand_rot.data_type = 'FLOAT_VECTOR'
    rand_rot.inputs['Min'].default_value = (0, 0, -math.pi)
    rand_rot.inputs['Max'].default_value = (0, 0, math.pi)
    rand_sc = nt.nodes.new('FunctionNodeRandomValue'); rand_sc.location = (-500, -400)
    rand_sc.data_type = 'FLOAT'
    rand_sc.inputs['Min'].default_value = 0.6
    rand_sc.inputs['Max'].default_value = 1.3
    ri = nt.nodes.new('GeometryNodeRealizeInstances'); ri.location = (100, 0)
    jn = nt.nodes.new('GeometryNodeJoinGeometry'); jn.location = (400, 0)
    nt.links.new(g_in.outputs[0], dp.inputs['Mesh'])
    nt.links.new(dp.outputs['Points'], ip.inputs['Points'])
    nt.links.new(oi.outputs['Geometry'], ip.inputs['Instance'])
    nt.links.new(rand_rot.outputs['Value'], ip.inputs['Rotation'])
    nt.links.new(rand_sc.outputs['Value'], ip.inputs['Scale'])
    nt.links.new(ip.outputs['Instances'], ri.inputs['Geometry'])
    nt.links.new(g_in.outputs[0], jn.inputs['Geometry'])
    nt.links.new(ri.outputs['Geometry'], jn.inputs['Geometry'])
    nt.links.new(jn.outputs['Geometry'], g_out.inputs[0])
    print('[apply_template] grass_field 完成: ' + str(_S) + 'm² density=' + str(_D))
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] grass_field 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: cherry_blossom_tree
templates.title: 樱花树（Skin 树干 + IcoSphere 花球 + 粉色材质）
templates.description: 用顶点骨架 + Skin modifier 生成树干树枝，顶端挂 3~5 个 IcoSphere 当樱花球（粉白 SSS 材质）。
templates.code:
import bpy, math, random
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _H = float({{height}})
    _BC = {{blossom_color|json}}
    _TC = {{trunk_color|json}}

    # 1. 树干（Skin）
    me = bpy.data.meshes.new(_NAME + '_trunk_mesh')
    obj = bpy.data.objects.new(_NAME + '_trunk', me)
    bpy.context.collection.objects.link(obj)
    obj.location = _LOC
    import bmesh
    bm = bmesh.new()
    v0 = bm.verts.new((0, 0, 0))
    v1 = bm.verts.new((0, 0, _H * 0.5))
    bm.edges.new((v0, v1))
    # 分支
    branches = []
    for i in range(5):
        ang = i * math.pi * 2 / 5
        bx = math.cos(ang) * _H * 0.25
        by = math.sin(ang) * _H * 0.25
        bz = _H * (0.7 + random.random() * 0.25)
        vb = bm.verts.new((bx, by, bz))
        bm.edges.new((v1, vb))
        branches.append((bx, by, bz))
    bm.to_mesh(me); bm.free()

    sk = obj.modifiers.new('Skin', 'SKIN')
    sk.use_smooth_shade = True
    # 调粗细：root 粗，顶端细
    for sv in obj.data.skin_vertices[0].data:
        sv.radius = (0.12, 0.12)
    # 最后几个分支顶点细一些
    n_verts = len(obj.data.skin_vertices[0].data)
    for idx in range(max(0, n_verts - 5), n_verts):
        obj.data.skin_vertices[0].data[idx].radius = (0.04, 0.04)
    sub = obj.modifiers.new('Sub', 'SUBSURF')
    sub.levels = 2

    trunk_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_trunk_mat')
    trunk_mat.use_nodes = True
    bsdf = trunk_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bsdf and 'Base Color' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_TC[0], _TC[1], _TC[2], 1.0)
    if bsdf and 'Roughness' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.85
    obj.data.materials.append(trunk_mat)

    # 2. 樱花球（每个分支顶端）
    blossom_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_blossom_mat')
    blossom_mat.use_nodes = True
    bsdf2 = blossom_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bsdf2 and 'Base Color' in bsdf2.inputs:
        bsdf2.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_BC[0], _BC[1], _BC[2], 1.0)
    if bsdf2 and 'Roughness' in bsdf2.inputs:
        bsdf2.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.6

    for (bx, by, bz) in branches:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_ico_sphere_add(radius=_H * 0.18, subdivisions=2, location=(_LOC[0] + bx, _LOC[1] + by, _LOC[2] + bz))
        ball = bpy.context.object; ball.name = _NAME + '_blossom'
        # 凹凸感
        bt = bpy.data.textures.new(ball.name + '_tex', 'CLOUDS')
        bt.noise_scale = 0.2
        dm = ball.modifiers.new('Bump', 'DISPLACE')
        dm.texture = bt
        dm.strength = _H * 0.04
        bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
        ball.data.materials.append(blossom_mat)
        ball.parent = obj
        ball.matrix_parent_inverse = obj.matrix_world.inverted()
    print('[apply_template] cherry_blossom_tree 完成: 树高 ' + str(_H) + 'm + ' + str(len(branches)) + ' 个花球')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] cherry_blossom_tree 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: bamboo_forest
templates.title: 竹林（Array 多根 cylinder + 关节段 + 随机高低）
templates.description: 用 cylinder 做竹竿（带 Array 节段感）+ Empty 分布，做出一片简易竹林。
templates.code:
import bpy, math, random
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _N = max(1, int({{count}}))
    _A = float({{area}})
    _H = float({{height}})

    bamboo_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
    bamboo_mat.use_nodes = True
    bsdf = bamboo_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bsdf and 'Base Color' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.45, 0.60, 0.30, 1.0)
    if bsdf and 'Roughness' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.6

    parts = []
    for i in range(_N):
        ang = random.random() * math.pi * 2
        r = random.random() * _A
        x = _LOC[0] + math.cos(ang) * r
        y = _LOC[1] + math.sin(ang) * r
        h = _H * (0.7 + random.random() * 0.6)
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.04 + random.random() * 0.02, depth=h, vertices=10, location=(x, y, _LOC[2] + h * 0.5))
        c = bpy.context.object; c.name = _NAME + '_' + str(i + 1)
        bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
        # 用 Array 加几个节段（缩放微变）让有竹节感
        bv = c.modifiers.new('Bevel', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.003; bv.segments = 2
        c.data.materials.append(bamboo_mat)
        parts.append(c)

    bpy.ops.object.empty_add(type='PLAIN_AXES', location=_LOC)
    root = bpy.context.object; root.name = _NAME + '_root'
    for p in parts:
        p.parent = root
        p.matrix_parent_inverse = root.matrix_world.inverted()
    print('[apply_template] bamboo_forest 完成: ' + str(len(parts)) + ' 根竹竿')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] bamboo_forest 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: forest_geonode
templates.title: 树林散布（Plane GN Distribute + 简易树 Instance）
templates.description: 在 Plane 上用 GN 散布树原型（圆锥+圆柱组合的低模树），数量参数化。
templates.code:
import bpy, math, random
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _S = float({{size}})
    _N = max(1, int({{count}}))

    # 树原型（圆柱 + 圆锥）
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.08, depth=0.8, location=(_LOC[0] + 100, 0, 0.4))
    trunk = bpy.context.object; trunk.name = _NAME + '_tree_trunk'
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cone_add(radius1=0.6, radius2=0, depth=2.0, vertices=8, location=(_LOC[0] + 100, 0, 1.8))
    leaves = bpy.context.object; leaves.name = _NAME + '_tree_leaves'
    bpy.ops.object.select_all(action='DESELECT')
    trunk.select_set(True); leaves.select_set(True)
    bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = leaves
    bpy.ops.object.join()
    tree = bpy.context.object; tree.name = _NAME + '_tree_proto'
    tree.hide_render = True; tree.hide_viewport = True

    # 材质
    m1 = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_tree_mat')
    m1.use_nodes = True
    bsdf = m1.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bsdf and 'Base Color' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.20, 0.45, 0.18, 1.0)
    if bsdf and 'Roughness' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.85
    tree.data.materials.append(m1)

    # 地面 plane + GN 散布
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=_S, location=_LOC)
    ground = bpy.context.object; ground.name = _NAME + '_ground'
    mod = ground.modifiers.new('GN_Forest', 'NODES')
    nt = bpy.data.node_groups.new(_NAME + '_GN', 'GeometryNodeTree')
    mod.node_group = nt
    try:
        nt.interface.new_socket('Geometry', in_out='INPUT', socket_type='NodeSocketGeometry')
        nt.interface.new_socket('Geometry', in_out='OUTPUT', socket_type='NodeSocketGeometry')
    except Exception:
        pass
    g_in = nt.nodes.new('NodeGroupInput'); g_in.location = (-800, 0)
    g_out = nt.nodes.new('NodeGroupOutput'); g_out.location = (800, 0)
    dp = nt.nodes.new('GeometryNodeDistributePointsOnFaces'); dp.location = (-500, 0)
    dens = max(0.05, float(_N) / max(1.0, _S * _S))
    if 'Density' in dp.inputs:
        dp.inputs['Density'].default_value = dens
    ip = nt.nodes.new('GeometryNodeInstanceOnPoints'); ip.location = (-200, 0)
    oi = nt.nodes.new('GeometryNodeObjectInfo'); oi.location = (-500, 200)
    oi.inputs['Object'].default_value = tree
    rs = nt.nodes.new('FunctionNodeRandomValue'); rs.location = (-500, -200)
    rs.data_type = 'FLOAT'
    rs.inputs['Min'].default_value = 0.7
    rs.inputs['Max'].default_value = 1.5
    ri = nt.nodes.new('GeometryNodeRealizeInstances'); ri.location = (100, 0)
    jn = nt.nodes.new('GeometryNodeJoinGeometry'); jn.location = (400, 0)
    nt.links.new(g_in.outputs[0], dp.inputs['Mesh'])
    nt.links.new(dp.outputs['Points'], ip.inputs['Points'])
    nt.links.new(oi.outputs['Geometry'], ip.inputs['Instance'])
    nt.links.new(rs.outputs['Value'], ip.inputs['Scale'])
    nt.links.new(ip.outputs['Instances'], ri.inputs['Geometry'])
    nt.links.new(g_in.outputs[0], jn.inputs['Geometry'])
    nt.links.new(ri.outputs['Geometry'], jn.inputs['Geometry'])
    nt.links.new(jn.outputs['Geometry'], g_out.inputs[0])
    print('[apply_template] forest_geonode 完成: ' + str(_S) + 'm² target=' + str(_N) + '棵 density=' + str(round(dens, 3)))
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] forest_geonode 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: snowy_terrain
