templates.description: 雪地版的 terrain：起伏柔和 + 白色基底 + Subsurface 微泛蓝。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _S = float({{size}})
    _STR = float({{strength}})

    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=_S, location=_LOC)
    obj = bpy.context.object; obj.name = _NAME
    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
    bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
    bpy.ops.mesh.subdivide(number_cuts=40)
    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

    tex = bpy.data.textures.new(_NAME + '_tex', 'CLOUDS')
    tex.noise_scale = 1.5
    dm = obj.modifiers.new('Displace', 'DISPLACE')
    dm.texture = tex
    dm.strength = _STR
    sub = obj.modifiers.new('Sub', 'SUBSURF')
    sub.levels = 1
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()

    mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
    mat.use_nodes = True
    bsdf = mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bsdf and 'Base Color' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.93, 0.95, 0.98, 1.0)
    if bsdf and 'Roughness' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.4
    # SSS 让雪有半透感
    for key in ['Subsurface Weight', 'Subsurface']:
        if key in bsdf.inputs:
            bsdf.inputs[key].default_value = 0.3
            break
    if 'Subsurface Radius' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Subsurface Radius'].default_value = (0.3, 0.4, 0.6)
    obj.data.materials.append(mat)
    print('[apply_template] snowy_terrain 完成: ' + str(_S) + 'm')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] snowy_terrain 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: torii_gate
templates.title: 鸟居（2 立柱 + 笠木 + 岛木，朱红漆色）
templates.description: 标准明神鸟居：2 根 cylinder 立柱（朱红） + 顶部笠木（横向贯通带翘角） + 岛木（短横） + 额束。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _H = float({{height}})
    _W = float({{width}})
    _C = {{color|json}}

    mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
    mat.use_nodes = True
    bsdf = mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bsdf and 'Base Color' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_C[0], _C[1], _C[2], 1.0)
    if bsdf and 'Roughness' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.4

    parts = []
    # 立柱 ×2
    pillar_r = _H * 0.05
    for sx in [-1, 1]:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=pillar_r, depth=_H, vertices=24, location=(_LOC[0] + sx * _W * 0.5, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H * 0.5))
        c = bpy.context.object; c.name = _NAME + '_pillar_' + ('R' if sx > 0 else 'L')
        bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
        parts.append(c)

    # 笠木（顶部横梁，比立柱间距长一些，两端翘起用 cube 简化）
    kasagi_y = pillar_r * 1.2
    kasagi_z = _H * 0.05
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H + kasagi_z))
    kasagi = bpy.context.object; kasagi.name = _NAME + '_kasagi'
    kasagi.scale = (_W + _H * 0.4, kasagi_y * 2, kasagi_z * 2)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bv = kasagi.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.02; bv.segments = 2
    parts.append(kasagi)

    # 岛木（笠木下方的短横）
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H - kasagi_z * 0.8))
    shimaki = bpy.context.object; shimaki.name = _NAME + '_shimaki'
    shimaki.scale = (_W + _H * 0.05, kasagi_y * 2.5, kasagi_z * 1.5)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bv = shimaki.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.015; bv.segments = 2
    parts.append(shimaki)

    # 额束（中柱）
    nuki_h = _H * 0.12
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H * 0.75))
    nuki = bpy.context.object; nuki.name = _NAME + '_nuki'
    nuki.scale = (_W * 1.05, kasagi_y * 1.5, nuki_h)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    parts.append(nuki)

    for p in parts:
        if not p.data.materials:
            p.data.materials.append(mat)
        else:
            p.data.materials[0] = mat

    bpy.ops.object.empty_add(type='PLAIN_AXES', location=_LOC)
    root = bpy.context.object; root.name = _NAME + '_root'
    for p in parts:
        p.parent = root
        p.matrix_parent_inverse = root.matrix_world.inverted()
    print('[apply_template] torii_gate 完成: ' + str(_H) + 'm 高 ' + str(_W) + 'm 宽')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] torii_gate 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: stone_lantern
templates.title: 石灯笼（基座+柱+灯台+灯室+顶盖，5 段组合）
templates.description: 日式石灯笼春日燈籠：方形基台 + 圆柱身 + 六角灯室（带镂空） + 六角顶盖 + 顶珠。

params.name: lit
params.description: 灯室是否发光（True=夜晚暖光）

templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _H = float({{height}})
    _LIT = bool({{lit}})

    mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_stone_mat')
    mat.use_nodes = True
    bsdf = mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bsdf and 'Base Color' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.55, 0.52, 0.48, 1.0)
    if bsdf and 'Roughness' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.9

    parts = []
    cz = _LOC[2]
    # 基台
    base_h = _H * 0.12
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], cz + base_h * 0.5))
    b = bpy.context.object; b.name = _NAME + '_base'
    b.scale = (_H * 0.4, _H * 0.4, base_h)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    parts.append(b); cz += base_h
    # 柱身
    pole_h = _H * 0.35
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=_H * 0.08, depth=pole_h, vertices=12, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], cz + pole_h * 0.5))
    p = bpy.context.object; p.name = _NAME + '_pole'
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    parts.append(p); cz += pole_h
    # 灯台（小平台）
    plat_h = _H * 0.06
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=_H * 0.18, depth=plat_h, vertices=6, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], cz + plat_h * 0.5))
    pl = bpy.context.object; pl.name = _NAME + '_platform'
    parts.append(pl); cz += plat_h
    # 灯室（六角柱）
    room_h = _H * 0.25
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=_H * 0.15, depth=room_h, vertices=6, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], cz + room_h * 0.5))
    room = bpy.context.object; room.name = _NAME + '_room'
    parts.append(room); cz += room_h
    # 顶盖（六角锥）
    cap_h = _H * 0.15
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cone_add(radius1=_H * 0.22, radius2=_H * 0.05, depth=cap_h, vertices=6, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], cz + cap_h * 0.5))
    cap = bpy.context.object; cap.name = _NAME + '_cap'
    parts.append(cap); cz += cap_h
    # 顶珠
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_uv_sphere_add(radius=_H * 0.04, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], cz + _H * 0.03))
    top = bpy.context.object; top.name = _NAME + '_top'
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    parts.append(top)

    for pt in parts:
        if not pt.data.materials:
            pt.data.materials.append(mat)
        else:
            pt.data.materials[0] = mat

    # 灯室如果点亮：换发光材质 + 内部 Point Light
    if _LIT:
        em_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_lit_mat')
        em_mat.use_nodes = True
        nt = em_mat.node_tree
        for n in list(nt.nodes):
            nt.nodes.remove(n)
        out = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeOutputMaterial')
        em = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeEmission')
        if 'Color' in em.inputs:
            em.inputs['Color'].default_value = (1.0, 0.75, 0.40, 1.0)
        if 'Strength' in em.inputs:
            em.inputs['Strength'].default_value = 6.0
        nt.links.new(em.outputs['Emission'], out.inputs['Surface'])
        room.data.materials.clear()
        room.data.materials.append(em_mat)
        # 内部 Point Light
        bpy.ops.object.light_add(type='POINT', location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H * 0.7))
        lt = bpy.context.object; lt.name = _NAME + '_light'
        lt.data.energy = 200
        lt.data.color = (1.0, 0.75, 0.40)
    print('[apply_template] stone_lantern 完成: 5 段堆叠 lit=' + str(_LIT))
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] stone_lantern 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: stone_steps
templates.title: 石阶（Cube + Array 沿 +Z + 灰石材质）
templates.description: 1 块石阶 cube + Array 沿 X+Z 等距复制 N 阶，灰色粗糙石材。
templates.code:
import bpy
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _N = max(1, int({{count}}))
    _W = float({{step_w}})
    _D = float({{step_d}})
    _H = float({{step_h}})

    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] + _D * 0.5, _LOC[2] + _H * 0.5))
    s = bpy.context.object; s.name = _NAME
    s.scale = (_W, _D, _H)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bv = s.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.01; bv.segments = 2
    arr = s.modifiers.new('Array', 'ARRAY')
    arr.use_relative_offset = False
    arr.use_constant_offset = True
    arr.constant_offset_displace = (0, _D, _H)
    arr.count = _N

    mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
    mat.use_nodes = True
    bsdf = mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bsdf and 'Base Color' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.55, 0.52, 0.48, 1.0)
    if bsdf and 'Roughness' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.9
    s.data.materials.append(mat)
    print('[apply_template] stone_steps 完成: ' + str(_N) + ' 阶')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] stone_steps 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: wooden_bridge
templates.title: 木桥（桥板 Array + 2 侧栏杆 + 4 桥墩）
templates.description: n 块木板（Array）+ 2 根栏杆扶手 + 4 立柱桥墩，朱红或木色可切换。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _L = float({{length}})
    _W = float({{width}})
    _C = {{color|json}}

    mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
    mat.use_nodes = True
    bsdf = mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bsdf and 'Base Color' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_C[0], _C[1], _C[2], 1.0)
    if bsdf and 'Roughness' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.65

    parts = []
    # 桥板（Array）
    plank_l = _W
    plank_d = 0.12
    n_planks = max(2, int(_L / 0.15))
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] - _L * 0.5 + plank_d * 0.5, _LOC[1], _LOC[2]))
    plank = bpy.context.object; plank.name = _NAME + '_plank'
    plank.scale = (plank_d * 0.85, plank_l, 0.04)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    arr = plank.modifiers.new('Arr', 'ARRAY')
    arr.use_relative_offset = False
    arr.use_constant_offset = True
    arr.constant_offset_displace = (plank_d, 0, 0)
    arr.count = n_planks
    parts.append(plank)

    # 2 根扶手
    for sy in [-1, 1]:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] + sy * _W * 0.5, _LOC[2] + 0.5))
        rail = bpy.context.object; rail.name = _NAME + '_rail_' + ('R' if sy > 0 else 'L')
        rail.scale = (_L, 0.05, 0.08)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        parts.append(rail)

    # 4 立柱桥墩
    for sx in [-1, 1]:
        for sy in [-1, 1]:
            bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] + sx * _L * 0.45, _LOC[1] + sy * _W * 0.5, _LOC[2] + 0.25))
            pl = bpy.context.object; pl.name = _NAME + '_post'
            pl.scale = (0.08, 0.08, 0.55)
            bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
            parts.append(pl)

    for p in parts:
        p.data.materials.append(mat)
    print('[apply_template] wooden_bridge 完成: ' + str(_L) + 'm 长 ' + str(n_planks) + ' 块板')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] wooden_bridge 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: tatami_floor
templates.title: 榻榻米地板（Plane + Array 拼块 + 黄绿色编织材质）
templates.description: 标准日式榻榻米（半畳/一畳），用 cube 单元 + Array X×Y 拼出整面。黄绿色 + Noise 编织感。
templates.code:
import bpy
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _R = max(1, int({{rows}}))
    _CO = max(1, int({{cols}}))
    _X = float({{tatami_x}})
    _Y = float({{tatami_y}})

    mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
    mat.use_nodes = True
    nt = mat.node_tree
    bsdf = nt.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bsdf and 'Base Color' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.76, 0.72, 0.45, 1.0)
    if bsdf and 'Roughness' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.85
    # 编织感：Noise + ColorRamp
    noise = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexNoise')
    noise.inputs['Scale'].default_value = 40.0
    cr = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeValToRGB')
    cr.color_ramp.elements[0].color = (0.65, 0.62, 0.35, 1)
    cr.color_ramp.elements[1].color = (0.85, 0.80, 0.50, 1)
    nt.links.new(noise.outputs['Fac'], cr.inputs['Fac'])
    if bsdf:
        nt.links.new(cr.outputs['Color'], bsdf.inputs['Base Color'])

    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] - (_R - 1) * 0.5 * _X, _LOC[1] - (_CO - 1) * 0.5 * _Y, _LOC[2] + 0.025))
    base = bpy.context.object; base.name = _NAME + '_unit'
    base.scale = (_X * 0.98, _Y * 0.98, 0.05)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bv = base.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.005; bv.segments = 2
    base.data.materials.append(mat)

    arr1 = base.modifiers.new('ArrX', 'ARRAY')
    arr1.use_relative_offset = False
    arr1.use_constant_offset = True
    arr1.constant_offset_displace = (_X, 0, 0)
    arr1.count = _R
    arr2 = base.modifiers.new('ArrY', 'ARRAY')
    arr2.use_relative_offset = False
    arr2.use_constant_offset = True
    arr2.constant_offset_displace = (0, _Y, 0)
    arr2.count = _CO
    print('[apply_template] tatami_floor 完成: ' + str(_R) + '×' + str(_CO) + ' = ' + str(_R * _CO) + ' 畳')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] tatami_floor 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: shoji_door
templates.title: 障子门（木格栅 + 半透白纸 plane）
templates.description: 外框 4 边 + 内部横竖木格栅（cube Array）+ 后侧一块半透白色 plane 当和纸。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _W = float({{width}})
    _H = float({{height}})
    _GX = max(1, int({{grid_x}}))
    _GY = max(1, int({{grid_y}}))

    wood_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_wood_mat')
    wood_mat.use_nodes = True
    bsdf = wood_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bsdf and 'Base Color' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.35, 0.25, 0.18, 1.0)
    if bsdf and 'Roughness' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.6

    paper_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_paper_mat')
    paper_mat.use_nodes = True
    pb = paper_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if pb and 'Base Color' in pb.inputs:
        pb.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.95, 0.93, 0.85, 1.0)
    if pb and 'Roughness' in pb.inputs:
        pb.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.8
    if pb and 'Alpha' in pb.inputs:
        pb.inputs['Alpha'].default_value = 0.85
    paper_mat.blend_method = 'BLEND'

    parts = []
    frame_w = 0.04
    # 4 边框
    for sy in [-1, 1]:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + sy * (_H * 0.5 - frame_w * 0.5)))
        h = bpy.context.object; h.name = _NAME + '_hframe'
        h.scale = (_W, frame_w, frame_w)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        parts.append(h)
    for sx in [-1, 1]:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] + sx * (_W * 0.5 - frame_w * 0.5), _LOC[1], _LOC[2]))
        v = bpy.context.object; v.name = _NAME + '_vframe'
        v.scale = (frame_w, frame_w, _H - frame_w * 2)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        parts.append(v)

    # 横格（Array）
    inner_h = _H - 2 * frame_w
    sx_step = inner_h / (_GY + 1)
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] - _H * 0.5 + frame_w + sx_step))
    h_grid = bpy.context.object; h_grid.name = _NAME + '_hgrid'
    h_grid.scale = (_W - 2 * frame_w, 0.015, 0.015)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    arr = h_grid.modifiers.new('ArrZ', 'ARRAY')
    arr.use_relative_offset = False
    arr.use_constant_offset = True
    arr.constant_offset_displace = (0, 0, sx_step)
    arr.count = _GY
    parts.append(h_grid)

    # 竖格
    inner_w = _W - 2 * frame_w
    sy_step = inner_w / (_GX + 1)
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] - _W * 0.5 + frame_w + sy_step, _LOC[1], _LOC[2]))
    v_grid = bpy.context.object; v_grid.name = _NAME + '_vgrid'
    v_grid.scale = (0.015, 0.015, _H - 2 * frame_w)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    arr2 = v_grid.modifiers.new('ArrX', 'ARRAY')
    arr2.use_relative_offset = False
    arr2.use_constant_offset = True
    arr2.constant_offset_displace = (sy_step, 0, 0)
    arr2.count = _GX
    parts.append(v_grid)

    # 和纸（薄 plane）
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] - 0.005, _LOC[2]))
    paper = bpy.context.object; paper.name = _NAME + '_paper'
    paper.rotation_euler = (math.radians(90), 0, 0)
    paper.scale = (_W - 2 * frame_w, _H - 2 * frame_w, 1)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=True)
    paper.data.materials.append(paper_mat)

    for p in parts:
        p.data.materials.append(wood_mat)
    print('[apply_template] shoji_door 完成: ' + str(_W) + 'x' + str(_H) + ' 木格 ' + str(_GX) + 'x' + str(_GY))
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] shoji_door 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: paper_lantern_string
templates.title: 纸灯笼挂串（多个 UV Sphere + 自发光 + 连线）
templates.description: 一条横向悬挂的纸灯笼串，球形（UV Sphere scaled）+ 内置点光 + 顶部红色绳子（cylinder 横线）。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _L = float({{length}})
    _N = max(1, int({{count}}))
    _C = {{color|json}}

    # 绳子
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.01, depth=_L, vertices=8, location=_LOC)
    rope = bpy.context.object; rope.name = _NAME + '_rope'
    rope.rotation_euler = (0, math.radians(90), 0)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=False)
    rope_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_rope_mat')
    rope_mat.use_nodes = True
    b1 = rope_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b1 and 'Base Color' in b1.inputs:
        b1.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.2, 0.15, 0.10, 1.0)
    rope.data.materials.append(rope_mat)

    # 发光灯笼材质
    em_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_em_mat')
    em_mat.use_nodes = True
    nt = em_mat.node_tree
    for n in list(nt.nodes):
        nt.nodes.remove(n)
    out = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeOutputMaterial')
    em = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeEmission')
    if 'Color' in em.inputs:
        em.inputs['Color'].default_value = (_C[0], _C[1], _C[2], 1.0)
    if 'Strength' in em.inputs:
        em.inputs['Strength'].default_value = 3.0
    nt.links.new(em.outputs['Emission'], out.inputs['Surface'])

    # 灯笼们
    step = _L / max(1, _N - 1) if _N > 1 else 0
    x0 = _LOC[0] - _L * 0.5
    for i in range(_N):
        x = x0 + i * step
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_uv_sphere_add(radius=0.12, location=(x, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] - 0.20))
        lan = bpy.context.object; lan.name = _NAME + '_' + str(i + 1)
        lan.scale = (1.0, 1.0, 1.2)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
        lan.data.materials.append(em_mat)
        # 短挂绳
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.005, depth=0.10, vertices=6, location=(x, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] - 0.05))
        sh = bpy.context.object; sh.name = _NAME + '_hang_' + str(i + 1)
        sh.data.materials.append(rope_mat)
    print('[apply_template] paper_lantern_string 完成: ' + str(_N) + ' 个灯笼 长 ' + str(_L) + 'm')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] paper_lantern_string 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: sakura_petals_particle
templates.title: 樱花瓣飘落（发射器 Plane + Particle Hair 静态散布）
templates.description: 上方一个大 Plane 当 emitter，用 Particle Hair 系统散布微小粉色花瓣 plane 实例，让画面里看起来在飘。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _A = float({{area}})
    _N = max(1, int({{count}}))
    _C = {{color|json}}

    # 花瓣 proto
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=0.04, location=(_LOC[0] + 100, 0, 0))
    pet = bpy.context.object; pet.name = _NAME + '_proto'
    pet.scale = (1.5, 0.7, 1.0)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    pet.hide_render = True; pet.hide_viewport = True
    pmat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
    pmat.use_nodes = True
    b = pmat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_C[0], _C[1], _C[2], 1.0)
    pet.data.materials.append(pmat)

    # 发射器（大 plane，hide_render）
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=_A, location=_LOC)
    emit = bpy.context.object; emit.name = _NAME + '_emitter'
    emit.hide_render = True

    # Particle Hair：在发射 plane 上散布
    psys_mod = emit.modifiers.new('Hair', 'PARTICLE_SYSTEM')
    psys = emit.particle_systems[-1]
    s = psys.settings
    s.type = 'HAIR'
    s.count = _N
    s.hair_length = 0.01
    s.render_type = 'OBJECT'
    s.instance_object = pet
    s.particle_size = 1.0
    s.use_rotations = True
    s.rotation_mode = 'GLOB_Z'
    s.rotation_factor_random = 1.0
    print('[apply_template] sakura_petals_particle 完成: ' + str(_N) + ' 片花瓣 area=' + str(_A) + 'm')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] sakura_petals_particle 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: shrine_offering_box
templates.title: 神社赛钱箱（木箱 + 投币顶部格栅）
templates.description: 深色木箱 + 顶部一排木条投币格栅 + 正面金属包边。
templates.code:
import bpy
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _S = float({{size}})

    wood = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_wood')
    wood.use_nodes = True
    bw = wood.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bw and 'Base Color' in bw.inputs:
        bw.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.20, 0.13, 0.08, 1.0)
    if bw and 'Roughness' in bw.inputs:
        bw.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.7

    metal = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_metal')
    metal.use_nodes = True
    bm = metal.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bm and 'Base Color' in bm.inputs:
        bm.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.6, 0.55, 0.40, 1.0)
    if bm and 'Metallic' in bm.inputs:
        bm.inputs['Metallic'].default_value = 0.8
    if bm and 'Roughness' in bm.inputs:
        bm.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.4

    parts = []
    # 主体
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _S * 0.4))
    box = bpy.context.object; box.name = _NAME + '_box'
    box.scale = (_S * 1.5, _S * 0.6, _S * 0.8)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bv = box.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.015; bv.segments = 2
    box.data.materials.append(wood)
    parts.append(box)

    # 顶部投币格栅（一排薄 cube）
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] - _S * 0.7, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _S * 0.82))
    bar = bpy.context.object; bar.name = _NAME + '_bar'
    bar.scale = (_S * 0.03, _S * 0.55, _S * 0.03)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    arr = bar.modifiers.new('Arr', 'ARRAY')
    arr.use_relative_offset = False
    arr.use_constant_offset = True
    arr.constant_offset_displace = (_S * 0.10, 0, 0)
    arr.count = 14
    bar.data.materials.append(metal)
    parts.append(bar)

    # 正面金属包边
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] - _S * 0.3 - 0.015, _LOC[2] + _S * 0.4))
    front = bpy.context.object; front.name = _NAME + '_front_strip'
    front.scale = (_S * 1.55, 0.02, _S * 0.05)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    front.data.materials.append(metal)
    parts.append(front)

    bpy.ops.object.empty_add(type='PLAIN_AXES', location=_LOC)
    root = bpy.context.object; root.name = _NAME + '_root'
    for p in parts:
        p.parent = root
        p.matrix_parent_inverse = root.matrix_world.inverted()
    print('[apply_template] shrine_offering_box 完成')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] shrine_offering_box 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: zen_garden_stones
templates.title: 枯山水（细沙 Plane + 弧形 wave 线条 + 5 块石头）
templates.description: 白沙 plane（细 Noise 起伏）+ 3~5 块大小不一的石头（rock_voronoi 类似）+ 同心环波纹（Wave 修饰）。
templates.code:
import bpy, math, random
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _S = float({{size}})
    _N = max(1, int({{stone_count}}))

    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=_S, location=_LOC)
    sand = bpy.context.object; sand.name = _NAME + '_sand'
    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
    bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
    bpy.ops.mesh.subdivide(number_cuts=30)
    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')
    wave = sand.modifiers.new('Wave', 'WAVE')
    wave.height = 0.015
    wave.width = 0.5
    wave.speed = 0
    wave.use_x = True
    wave.use_y = True
    s_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_sand_mat')
    s_mat.use_nodes = True
    bs = s_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bs and 'Base Color' in bs.inputs:
        bs.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.93, 0.90, 0.82, 1.0)
    if bs and 'Roughness' in bs.inputs:
        bs.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.95
    sand.data.materials.append(s_mat)

    stone_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_stone_mat')
    stone_mat.use_nodes = True
    bst = stone_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bst and 'Base Color' in bst.inputs:
        bst.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.35, 0.32, 0.28, 1.0)
    if bst and 'Roughness' in bst.inputs:
        bst.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.9

    for i in range(_N):
        sx = (random.random() - 0.5) * _S * 0.7
        sy = (random.random() - 0.5) * _S * 0.7
        sz = 0.10 + random.random() * 0.20
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_ico_sphere_add(radius=sz, subdivisions=2, location=(_LOC[0] + sx, _LOC[1] + sy, _LOC[2] + sz * 0.5))
        st = bpy.context.object; st.name = _NAME + '_stone_' + str(i + 1)
        st.scale = (1.2, 0.8, 0.6)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        tex = bpy.data.textures.new(st.name + '_tex', 'VORONOI')
        tex.noise_scale = 0.3
        dm = st.modifiers.new('Disp', 'DISPLACE')
        dm.texture = tex
        dm.strength = sz * 0.2
        bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
        st.data.materials.append(stone_mat)
    print('[apply_template] zen_garden_stones 完成: ' + str(_S) + 'm 沙地 + ' + str(_N) + ' 块石')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] zen_garden_stones 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: street_lamp_post
templates.title: 路灯（弯臂路灯 + 灯头自发光）
templates.description: 经典街道路灯：垂直立柱 + 弯臂横梁 + 灯罩（自发光） + 内置点光源。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _H = float({{height}})
    _LIT = bool({{lit}})
    _C = {{color|json}}

    pole_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_pole_mat')
    pole_mat.use_nodes = True
    b = pole_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_C[0], _C[1], _C[2], 1.0)
    if b and 'Metallic' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Metallic'].default_value = 0.6
    if b and 'Roughness' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.5

    parts = []
    # 立柱
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.08, depth=_H, vertices=16, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H * 0.5))
    pole = bpy.context.object; pole.name = _NAME + '_pole'
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    parts.append(pole)
    # 弯臂横梁
    arm_len = _H * 0.25
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.05, depth=arm_len, vertices=12, location=(_LOC[0] + arm_len * 0.5, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H - 0.1))
    arm = bpy.context.object; arm.name = _NAME + '_arm'
    arm.rotation_euler = (0, math.radians(90), 0)
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    parts.append(arm)
    # 灯罩
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] + arm_len, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H - 0.15))
    head = bpy.context.object; head.name = _NAME + '_head'
    head.scale = (0.30, 0.18, 0.10)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bv = head.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.015; bv.segments = 2

    for p in parts:
        p.data.materials.append(pole_mat)

    # 灯罩材质（发光与否）
    if _LIT:
        em_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_em_mat')
        em_mat.use_nodes = True
        nt = em_mat.node_tree
        for n in list(nt.nodes):
            nt.nodes.remove(n)
        out = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeOutputMaterial')
        em = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeEmission')
        if 'Color' in em.inputs:
            em.inputs['Color'].default_value = (1.0, 0.85, 0.55, 1.0)
        if 'Strength' in em.inputs:
            em.inputs['Strength'].default_value = 10.0
        nt.links.new(em.outputs['Emission'], out.inputs['Surface'])
        head.data.materials.append(em_mat)
        bpy.ops.object.light_add(type='POINT', location=(_LOC[0] + arm_len, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H - 0.25))
        lt = bpy.context.object; lt.name = _NAME + '_light'
        lt.data.energy = 500
        lt.data.color = (1.0, 0.85, 0.55)
    else:
        head.data.materials.append(pole_mat)

    print('[apply_template] street_lamp_post 完成: ' + str(_H) + 'm lit=' + str(_LIT))
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] street_lamp_post 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: traffic_light
templates.title: 红绿灯（立柱 + 3 灯泡 + 自发光选状态）
templates.description: 立式 3 色红绿灯：黑色立柱 + 长方形灯箱 + 3 个圆灯（红/黄/绿，当前 active 那一个发光）。

params.name: active
params.description: 当前点亮：red / yellow / green / off

templates.code:
import bpy
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _H = float({{height}})
    _ACT = {{active|json}}

    box_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_box_mat')
    box_mat.use_nodes = True
    b = box_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.05, 0.05, 0.05, 1.0)
    if b and 'Roughness' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.4

    # 立柱
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.08, depth=_H, vertices=12, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H * 0.5))
    pole = bpy.context.object; pole.name = _NAME + '_pole'
    pole.data.materials.append(box_mat)
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()

    # 灯箱
    box_h = 0.9
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] + 0.2, _LOC[2] + _H - box_h * 0.5))
    box = bpy.context.object; box.name = _NAME + '_box'
    box.scale = (0.32, 0.22, box_h)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bv = box.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.02; bv.segments = 2
    box.data.materials.append(box_mat)

    # 3 个圆灯
    colors = {'red': (1.0, 0.10, 0.10), 'yellow': (1.0, 0.85, 0.10), 'green': (0.10, 1.0, 0.30)}
    z_offs = {'red': _H - 0.18, 'yellow': _H - box_h * 0.5, 'green': _H - box_h + 0.18}
    for k in ['red', 'yellow', 'green']:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_uv_sphere_add(radius=0.10, segments=20, ring_count=10, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] + 0.32, _LOC[2] + z_offs[k]))
        bulb = bpy.context.object; bulb.name = _NAME + '_' + k
        bulb.scale = (1.0, 0.5, 1.0)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
        if _ACT == k:
            em_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_' + k + '_em')
            em_mat.use_nodes = True
            nt = em_mat.node_tree
            for n in list(nt.nodes):
                nt.nodes.remove(n)
            out = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeOutputMaterial')
            em = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeEmission')
            c = colors[k]
            if 'Color' in em.inputs:
                em.inputs['Color'].default_value = (c[0], c[1], c[2], 1.0)
            if 'Strength' in em.inputs:
                em.inputs['Strength'].default_value = 8.0
            nt.links.new(em.outputs['Emission'], out.inputs['Surface'])
            bulb.data.materials.append(em_mat)
        else:
            dim_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_' + k + '_dim')
            dim_mat.use_nodes = True
            bd = dim_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
            c = colors[k]
            if bd and 'Base Color' in bd.inputs:
                bd.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (c[0] * 0.25, c[1] * 0.25, c[2] * 0.25, 1.0)
            if bd and 'Roughness' in bd.inputs:
                bd.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.6
            bulb.data.materials.append(dim_mat)
    print('[apply_template] traffic_light 完成: active=' + _ACT)
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] traffic_light 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: utility_pole_wires
templates.title: 电线杆 + 电线（Array 立柱 + 多根 catenary 电线）
templates.description: 二次元天空必备：N 根木质电线杆（cylinder + 顶部横担 + 绝缘子）+ 4~6 根贯穿的电线（Bezier 微下垂），关键填补 AI 反复造不出复杂街景的根本药。

params.name: count
params.description: 电线杆数量（沿 +X 排列）

templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _N = max(2, int({{count}}))
    _SP = float({{spacing}})
    _H = float({{height}})
    _W = max(2, min(int({{wires}}), 6))

    pole_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_pole_mat')
    pole_mat.use_nodes = True
    b = pole_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.35, 0.28, 0.20, 1.0)
    if b and 'Roughness' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.8

    wire_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_wire_mat')
    wire_mat.use_nodes = True
    bw = wire_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bw and 'Base Color' in bw.inputs:
        bw.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.05, 0.05, 0.05, 1.0)
    if bw and 'Roughness' in bw.inputs:
        bw.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.6

    pole_xs = [_LOC[0] + i * _SP for i in range(_N)]

    for i, px in enumerate(pole_xs):
        # 立柱（圆柱）
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.10, depth=_H, vertices=10, location=(px, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H * 0.5))
        pole = bpy.context.object; pole.name = _NAME + '_pole_' + str(i + 1)
        bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
        pole.data.materials.append(pole_mat)
        # 顶部横担（水平 cube）
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(px, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H - 0.15))
        cross = bpy.context.object; cross.name = _NAME + '_cross_' + str(i + 1)
        cross.scale = (0.10, 1.4, 0.06)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        cross.data.materials.append(pole_mat)
        # 第 2 层横担
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(px, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H - 0.50))
        cross2 = bpy.context.object; cross2.name = _NAME + '_cross2_' + str(i + 1)
        cross2.scale = (0.10, 1.0, 0.05)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        cross2.data.materials.append(pole_mat)

    # 电线（贝塞尔下垂）
    # 总长度跨越所有杆
    x0 = pole_xs[0]; x1 = pole_xs[-1]
    wire_y_offsets = []
    if _W >= 4:
        wire_y_offsets = [-0.6, -0.2, 0.2, 0.6][:_W]
    else:
        wire_y_offsets = [-0.4 + i * 0.4 for i in range(_W)]
    for wi, dy in enumerate(wire_y_offsets):
        # 用 mesh + cylinder（简单可控），分段画
        for i in range(len(pole_xs) - 1):
            xa = pole_xs[i]; xb = pole_xs[i + 1]
            mx = (xa + xb) * 0.5
            length = xb - xa
            sag = 0.15  # 下垂量
            # 用 3 段简化下垂
            for seg_i, frac in enumerate([0.25, 0.5, 0.75]):
                sx = xa + (xb - xa) * frac
                seg_h_offset = -sag * math.sin(frac * math.pi)
                bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.012, depth=length / 3.0, vertices=6, location=(sx, _LOC[1] + dy, _LOC[2] + _H - 0.15 + seg_h_offset))
                w = bpy.context.object; w.name = _NAME + '_wire_' + str(wi + 1) + '_' + str(i + 1) + '_' + str(seg_i + 1)
                w.rotation_euler = (0, math.radians(90), 0)
                bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=False)
                w.data.materials.append(wire_mat)
    print('[apply_template] utility_pole_wires 完成: ' + str(_N) + ' 杆 × ' + str(_W) + ' 线')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] utility_pole_wires 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: vending_machine
templates.title: 自动贩卖机（机身 + 玻璃窗 + 商品架 + 自发光屏）
templates.description: 日式街角自动贩卖机：红/蓝外壳 + 上半部分玻璃货柜（可见商品罐） + 下方取货口 + 顶部价签自发光。
templates.code:
import bpy
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _C = {{color|json}}

    body_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_body_mat')
    body_mat.use_nodes = True
    b = body_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_C[0], _C[1], _C[2], 1.0)
    if b and 'Roughness' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.3

    glass_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_glass_mat')
    glass_mat.use_nodes = True
    bg = glass_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bg:
        if 'Base Color' in bg.inputs:
            bg.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.92, 0.94, 0.98, 1.0)
        if 'Roughness' in bg.inputs:
            bg.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.05
        for k in ['Transmission Weight', 'Transmission']:
            if k in bg.inputs:
                bg.inputs[k].default_value = 0.95
                break

    em_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_screen_em')
    em_mat.use_nodes = True
    nt = em_mat.node_tree
    for n in list(nt.nodes):
        nt.nodes.remove(n)
    out = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeOutputMaterial')
    em = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeEmission')
    if 'Color' in em.inputs:
        em.inputs['Color'].default_value = (1.0, 0.95, 0.85, 1.0)
    if 'Strength' in em.inputs:
        em.inputs['Strength'].default_value = 3.0
    nt.links.new(em.outputs['Emission'], out.inputs['Surface'])

    # 机身
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + 0.9))
    body = bpy.context.object; body.name = _NAME + '_body'
    body.scale = (1.0, 0.7, 1.8)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bv = body.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.015; bv.segments = 2
    body.data.materials.append(body_mat)

    # 玻璃窗（前面凹进去）
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] - 0.35, _LOC[2] + 1.05))
    glass = bpy.context.object; glass.name = _NAME + '_glass'
    glass.scale = (0.88, 0.02, 1.0)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    glass.data.materials.append(glass_mat)

    # 商品架（3 排 × 4 罐，UV sphere scaled）
    for r in range(3):
        z = _LOC[2] + 0.7 + r * 0.35
        for c in range(4):
            x = _LOC[0] - 0.35 + c * 0.22
            bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.05, depth=0.20, vertices=10, location=(x, _LOC[1] - 0.30, z))
            can = bpy.context.object; can.name = _NAME + '_can_' + str(r) + '_' + str(c)
            cmat = bpy.data.materials.new(can.name + '_mat')
            cmat.use_nodes = True
            bc = cmat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
            if bc and 'Base Color' in bc.inputs:
                import random
                bc.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (random.random() * 0.6 + 0.3, random.random() * 0.6 + 0.3, random.random() * 0.6 + 0.3, 1.0)
            if bc and 'Metallic' in bc.inputs:
                bc.inputs['Metallic'].default_value = 0.4
            can.data.materials.append(cmat)

    # 顶部价签屏（自发光）
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] - 0.35, _LOC[2] + 1.70))
    screen = bpy.context.object; screen.name = _NAME + '_screen'
    screen.scale = (0.88, 0.02, 0.15)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    screen.data.materials.append(em_mat)

    # 取货口
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] - 0.32, _LOC[2] + 0.15))
    slot = bpy.context.object; slot.name = _NAME + '_slot'
    slot.scale = (0.6, 0.10, 0.10)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    s_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_slot_mat')
    s_mat.use_nodes = True
    bs = s_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bs and 'Base Color' in bs.inputs:
        bs.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.05, 0.05, 0.05, 1.0)
    slot.data.materials.append(s_mat)
    print('[apply_template] vending_machine 完成')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] vending_machine 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: neon_sign
templates.title: 霓虹招牌（cube 矩形板 + 自发光描边）
templates.description: 一块壁挂矩形板（黑色背板）+ 内嵌发光描边（cube 排成 ring）+ 强自发光，街道夜景立马有日系氛围。
templates.code:
import bpy
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _W = float({{width}})
    _H = float({{height}})
    _C = {{color|json}}
    _S = float({{strength}})

    # 背板
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=_LOC)
    bg = bpy.context.object; bg.name = _NAME + '_bg'
    bg.scale = (_W, 0.04, _H)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bg_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_bg_mat')
    bg_mat.use_nodes = True
    b = bg_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.05, 0.05, 0.05, 1.0)
    bg.data.materials.append(bg_mat)

    # 发光描边材质
    em_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_em_mat')
    em_mat.use_nodes = True
    nt = em_mat.node_tree
    for n in list(nt.nodes):
        nt.nodes.remove(n)
    out = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeOutputMaterial')
    em = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeEmission')
    if 'Color' in em.inputs:
        em.inputs['Color'].default_value = (_C[0], _C[1], _C[2], 1.0)
    if 'Strength' in em.inputs:
        em.inputs['Strength'].default_value = _S
    nt.links.new(em.outputs['Emission'], out.inputs['Surface'])

    # 4 边描边（细 cube）
    th = 0.025
    inset = 0.05
    parts = []
    for sz in [-1, 1]:
        # 顶/底
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] - 0.03, _LOC[2] + sz * (_H * 0.5 - th * 0.5 - inset)))
        b1 = bpy.context.object; b1.name = _NAME + '_h'
        b1.scale = (_W - 2 * inset, th, th)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        parts.append(b1)
        # 左/右
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] + sz * (_W * 0.5 - th * 0.5 - inset), _LOC[1] - 0.03, _LOC[2]))
        b2 = bpy.context.object; b2.name = _NAME + '_v'
        b2.scale = (th, th, _H - 2 * inset)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        parts.append(b2)
    for p in parts:
        p.data.materials.append(em_mat)
    print('[apply_template] neon_sign 完成: ' + str(_W) + 'x' + str(_H) + 'm strength=' + str(_S))
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] neon_sign 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: asphalt_road_lanes
templates.title: 沥青路 + 车道线（Plane + Noise 沥青 + 黄/白线）
templates.description: 黑色 plane（Noise 增加沥青颗粒感） + 中央双黄线 + 两侧白色边缘线 + 可选虚线。
templates.code:
import bpy
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _L = float({{length}})
    _W = float({{width}})

    # 路面
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=1, location=_LOC)
    road = bpy.context.object; road.name = _NAME + '_surface'
    road.scale = (_L, _W, 1.0)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    r_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
    r_mat.use_nodes = True
    nt = r_mat.node_tree
    bsdf = nt.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bsdf and 'Base Color' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.05, 0.05, 0.06, 1.0)
    if bsdf and 'Roughness' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.9
    # 噪波加颗粒
    noise = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexNoise')
    noise.inputs['Scale'].default_value = 60.0
    bump = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeBump')
    bump.inputs['Strength'].default_value = 0.05
    nt.links.new(noise.outputs['Fac'], bump.inputs['Height'])
    if bsdf and 'Normal' in bsdf.inputs:
        nt.links.new(bump.outputs['Normal'], bsdf.inputs['Normal'])
    road.data.materials.append(r_mat)

    # 中央双黄线
    y_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_yellow')
    y_mat.use_nodes = True
    by = y_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if by and 'Base Color' in by.inputs:
        by.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (1.0, 0.78, 0.05, 1.0)
    w_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_white')
    w_mat.use_nodes = True
    bw = w_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bw and 'Base Color' in bw.inputs:
        bw.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.95, 0.95, 0.95, 1.0)

    for dy in [-0.05, 0.05]:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] + dy, _LOC[2] + 0.001))
        l = bpy.context.object; l.name = _NAME + '_yellow_' + str(dy)
        l.scale = (_L, 0.04, 1.0)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        l.data.materials.append(y_mat)

    for sy in [-1, 1]:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] + sy * (_W * 0.5 - 0.10), _LOC[2] + 0.001))
        l = bpy.context.object; l.name = _NAME + '_white_' + ('R' if sy > 0 else 'L')
        l.scale = (_L, 0.04, 1.0)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        l.data.materials.append(w_mat)
    print('[apply_template] asphalt_road_lanes 完成: ' + str(_L) + 'x' + str(_W) + 'm')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] asphalt_road_lanes 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: crosswalk_zebra
templates.title: 斑马线（白色短 plane + Array 横向重复）
templates.description: 1 块白色 plane + Array 沿 Y 等距复制 N 条。可贴在 asphalt_road_lanes 上。

params.name: length
params.description: 斑马线 X 方向长（人走方向）

params.name: bar_y
params.description: 每条 Y 方向宽（米）

templates.code:
import bpy
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _L = float({{length}})
    _N = max(1, int({{bars}}))
    _BY = float({{bar_y}})
    _G = float({{gap}})

    total_y = _N * _BY + (_N - 1) * _G
    y0 = _LOC[1] - total_y * 0.5 + _BY * 0.5

    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], y0, _LOC[2]))
    bar = bpy.context.object; bar.name = _NAME + '_bar'
    bar.scale = (_L, _BY, 1.0)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    arr = bar.modifiers.new('Arr', 'ARRAY')
    arr.use_relative_offset = False
    arr.use_constant_offset = True
    arr.constant_offset_displace = (0, _BY + _G, 0)
    arr.count = _N

    mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
    mat.use_nodes = True
    b = mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.95, 0.95, 0.95, 1.0)
    if b and 'Roughness' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.7
    bar.data.materials.append(mat)
    print('[apply_template] crosswalk_zebra 完成: ' + str(_N) + ' 条')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] crosswalk_zebra 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: window_with_frame
templates.title: 带框窗户（4 边木框 + 玻璃 + 横向窗棂）
templates.description: 外框 4 边 + 1 块半透玻璃 plane + 十字窗棂 + 可选挂在墙体里。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _W = float({{width}})
    _H = float({{height}})
    _FC = {{frame_color|json}}

    frame_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_frame_mat')
    frame_mat.use_nodes = True
    b = frame_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_FC[0], _FC[1], _FC[2], 1.0)
    if b and 'Roughness' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.5

    glass_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_glass_mat')
    glass_mat.use_nodes = True
    bg = glass_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bg:
        if 'Base Color' in bg.inputs:
            bg.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.85, 0.92, 0.98, 1.0)
        if 'Roughness' in bg.inputs:
            bg.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.02
        for k in ['Transmission Weight', 'Transmission']:
            if k in bg.inputs:
                bg.inputs[k].default_value = 0.95
                break
        if 'IOR' in bg.inputs:
            bg.inputs['IOR'].default_value = 1.5

    fw = 0.05
    parts = []
    # 4 边
    for sy in [-1, 1]:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + sy * (_H * 0.5 - fw * 0.5)))
        h = bpy.context.object; h.name = _NAME + '_hf'
        h.scale = (_W, 0.08, fw)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        parts.append(h)
    for sx in [-1, 1]:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] + sx * (_W * 0.5 - fw * 0.5), _LOC[1], _LOC[2]))
        v = bpy.context.object; v.name = _NAME + '_vf'
        v.scale = (fw, 0.08, _H - 2 * fw)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        parts.append(v)
    # 十字窗棂
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=_LOC)
    cross_h = bpy.context.object; cross_h.name = _NAME + '_cross_h'
    cross_h.scale = (_W - 2 * fw, 0.04, 0.025)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    parts.append(cross_h)
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=_LOC)
    cross_v = bpy.context.object; cross_v.name = _NAME + '_cross_v'
    cross_v.scale = (0.025, 0.04, _H - 2 * fw)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    parts.append(cross_v)

    for p in parts:
        p.data.materials.append(frame_mat)

    # 玻璃
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=1, location=_LOC)
    glass = bpy.context.object; glass.name = _NAME + '_glass'
    glass.rotation_euler = (math.radians(90), 0, 0)
    glass.scale = (_W - 2 * fw, _H - 2 * fw, 1)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=True)
    glass.data.materials.append(glass_mat)
    print('[apply_template] window_with_frame 完成: ' + str(_W) + 'x' + str(_H) + 'm')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] window_with_frame 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

    bm = metal.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bm and 'Base Color' in bm.inputs:
        bm.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.75, 0.70, 0.55, 1.0)
    if bm and 'Metallic' in bm.inputs:
        bm.inputs['Metallic'].default_value = 0.9
    if bm and 'Roughness' in bm.inputs:
        bm.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.2

    fw = 0.06
    # 门框
    parts = []
    for sx in [-1, 1]:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] + sx * (_W * 0.5 + fw * 0.5), _LOC[1], _LOC[2]))
        v = bpy.context.object; v.name = _NAME + '_vf'
        v.scale = (fw, 0.10, _H + fw)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        parts.append(v)
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H * 0.5 + fw * 0.5))
    top_f = bpy.context.object; top_f.name = _NAME + '_top_f'
    top_f.scale = (_W + 2 * fw, 0.10, fw)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    parts.append(top_f)
    for p in parts:
        p.data.materials.append(mat)

    # 门板
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=_LOC)
    door = bpy.context.object; door.name = _NAME + '_door'
    door.scale = (_W, 0.04, _H)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bv = door.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.005; bv.segments = 2
    door.data.materials.append(mat)

    # 门把手
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_uv_sphere_add(radius=0.04, location=(_LOC[0] + _W * 0.4, _LOC[1] - 0.05, _LOC[2] - 0.10))
    handle = bpy.context.object; handle.name = _NAME + '_handle'
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    handle.data.materials.append(metal)
    print('[apply_template] door_with_frame 完成: ' + str(_W) + 'x' + str(_H) + 'm')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] door_with_frame 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: ceiling_lamp
templates.title: 吸顶灯（半球罩 + 自发光 + 顶部圆盘 + 内置 Point Light）
templates.description: 圆形顶座 + 半球乳白灯罩（自发光） + Blender Point Light 真实照亮房间。
templates.code:
import bpy
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _R = float({{radius}})
    _S = float({{strength}})

    # 顶座（圆盘）
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=_R * 1.05, depth=0.03, vertices=24, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] - 0.015))
    base = bpy.context.object; base.name = _NAME + '_base'
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    b_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_base_mat')
    b_mat.use_nodes = True
    bb = b_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bb and 'Base Color' in bb.inputs:
        bb.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.85, 0.85, 0.85, 1.0)
    base.data.materials.append(b_mat)

    # 半球灯罩
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_uv_sphere_add(radius=_R, segments=24, ring_count=12, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] - 0.04))
    sh = bpy.context.object; sh.name = _NAME + '_shade'
    # 切掉上半（只留下半球）— 用 Bisect 简化：直接 scale Z
    sh.scale = (1.0, 1.0, 0.5)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()

    em_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_em_mat')
    em_mat.use_nodes = True
    nt = em_mat.node_tree
    for n in list(nt.nodes):
        nt.nodes.remove(n)
    out = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeOutputMaterial')
    em = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeEmission')
    if 'Color' in em.inputs:
        em.inputs['Color'].default_value = (1.0, 0.97, 0.92, 1.0)
    if 'Strength' in em.inputs:
        em.inputs['Strength'].default_value = 3.0
    nt.links.new(em.outputs['Emission'], out.inputs['Surface'])
    sh.data.materials.append(em_mat)

    # Point Light
    bpy.ops.object.light_add(type='POINT', location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] - 0.10))
    lt = bpy.context.object; lt.name = _NAME + '_light'
    lt.data.energy = _S
    lt.data.color = (1.0, 0.97, 0.92)
    print('[apply_template] ceiling_lamp 完成: r=' + str(_R) + ' strength=' + str(_S))
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] ceiling_lamp 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.code:
import bpy
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _W = float({{desk_w}})
    _D = float({{desk_d}})
    _H = float({{desk_h}})

    wood = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_wood')
    wood.use_nodes = True
    b = wood.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.55, 0.40, 0.28, 1.0)
    if b and 'Roughness' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.55

    metal = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_metal')
    metal.use_nodes = True
    bm = metal.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bm and 'Base Color' in bm.inputs:
        bm.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.7, 0.7, 0.72, 1.0)
    if bm and 'Metallic' in bm.inputs:
        bm.inputs['Metallic'].default_value = 0.85
    if bm and 'Roughness' in bm.inputs:
        bm.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.3

    em = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_screen')
    em.use_nodes = True
    nt = em.node_tree
    for n in list(nt.nodes):
        nt.nodes.remove(n)
    out_n = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeOutputMaterial')
    em_n = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeEmission')
    if 'Color' in em_n.inputs:
        em_n.inputs['Color'].default_value = (0.6, 0.85, 1.0, 1.0)
    if 'Strength' in em_n.inputs:
        em_n.inputs['Strength'].default_value = 2.0
    nt.links.new(em_n.outputs['Emission'], out_n.inputs['Surface'])

    # 桌面
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H - 0.02))
    top = bpy.context.object; top.name = _NAME + '_top'
    top.scale = (_W, _D, 0.04)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bv = top.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.005; bv.segments = 2
    top.data.materials.append(wood)
    # 4 桌腿
    for sx in [-1, 1]:
        for sy in [-1, 1]:
            bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] + sx * (_W * 0.5 - 0.05), _LOC[1] + sy * (_D * 0.5 - 0.05), _LOC[2] + (_H - 0.04) * 0.5))
            leg = bpy.context.object; leg.name = _NAME + '_leg'
            leg.scale = (0.05, 0.05, _H - 0.04)
            bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
            leg.data.materials.append(wood)

    # 笔记本电脑（底座 + 屏）
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] - 0.05, _LOC[1] + 0.10, _LOC[2] + _H + 0.005))
    lap_b = bpy.context.object; lap_b.name = _NAME + '_laptop_base'
    lap_b.scale = (0.35, 0.25, 0.015)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    lap_b.data.materials.append(metal)
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] - 0.05, _LOC[1] + 0.22, _LOC[2] + _H + 0.12))
    lap_s = bpy.context.object; lap_s.name = _NAME + '_laptop_screen'
    lap_s.scale = (0.34, 0.012, 0.22)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    lap_s.rotation_euler = (-0.20, 0, 0)
    lap_s.data.materials.append(em)

    # 独立键盘
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] + 0.25, _LOC[1] - 0.10, _LOC[2] + _H + 0.015))
    kb = bpy.context.object; kb.name = _NAME + '_keyboard'
    kb.scale = (0.40, 0.13, 0.012)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    kb.data.materials.append(metal)

    # 鼠标
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_uv_sphere_add(radius=0.04, location=(_LOC[0] + 0.55, _LOC[1] - 0.05, _LOC[2] + _H + 0.025))
    ms = bpy.context.object; ms.name = _NAME + '_mouse'
    ms.scale = (1.2, 1.8, 0.5)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    ms.data.materials.append(metal)

    # 杯
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.035, depth=0.10, vertices=20, location=(_LOC[0] - 0.50, _LOC[1] - 0.20, _LOC[2] + _H + 0.05))
    cup = bpy.context.object; cup.name = _NAME + '_cup'
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    cup_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_cup_mat')
    cup_mat.use_nodes = True
    bc = cup_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bc and 'Base Color' in bc.inputs:
        bc.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.95, 0.92, 0.85, 1.0)
    cup.data.materials.append(cup_mat)

    # 笔筒
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.04, depth=0.12, vertices=16, location=(_LOC[0] - 0.55, _LOC[1] + 0.20, _LOC[2] + _H + 0.06))
    holder = bpy.context.object; holder.name = _NAME + '_pen_holder'
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    holder.data.materials.append(metal)

    print('[apply_template] desk_workspace 完成: 桌 + 笔记本 + 键鼠 + 杯 + 笔筒')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] desk_workspace 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

import bpy
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}

    mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
    mat.use_nodes = True
    b = mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:

    metal = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_metal')

    desk_w = 0.65; desk_d = 0.45; desk_h = 0.72

    # 把手
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.012, depth=0.06, vertices=10, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] - desk_d * 0.5 - 0.02, _LOC[2] + desk_h - 0.12))
    h = bpy.context.object; h.name = _NAME + '_handle'
    h.rotation_euler = (0, 1.5708, 0)

            bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.018, depth=desk_h - 0.04, vertices=10, location=(_LOC[0] + sx * (desk_w * 0.45), _LOC[1] + sy * (desk_d * 0.42), _LOC[2] + (desk_h - 0.04) * 0.5))

templates.name: bookshelf_full
templates.title: 满书架（在 bookshelf_array 基础上塞 N 排书）
templates.description: 继承书架结构，每层用 Array 排满 cube 书（高度宽度厚度随机）+ 不同颜色材质。
templates.code:
import bpy, random
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _W = float({{width}})
    _D = float({{depth}})
    _H = float({{height}})
    _SC = max(2, int({{shelf_count}}))

    wood = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_wood')
    wood.use_nodes = True
    b = wood.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.55, 0.40, 0.25, 1.0)
    if b and 'Roughness' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.6

    pt = 0.025
    # 侧板 ×2 + 顶/底 + 中间隔板
    for sx in [-1, 1]:
        cx = _LOC[0] + sx * (_W * 0.5 - pt * 0.5)
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(cx, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H * 0.5))
        s = bpy.context.object; s.name = _NAME + '_side'
        s.scale = (pt, _D, _H)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        s.data.materials.append(wood)
    for lab, sz in [('bottom', pt * 0.5), ('top', _H - pt * 0.5)]:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + sz))
        p = bpy.context.object; p.name = _NAME + '_' + lab
        p.scale = (_W - 2 * pt, _D, pt)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        p.data.materials.append(wood)

    span = (_H - 2 * pt) / _SC
    # 隔板 + 书
    for i in range(_SC):
        z_shelf = _LOC[2] + pt + i * span
        # 隔板（最后一层不放，避免和顶板重叠）
        if i > 0:
            bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], z_shelf))
            sh = bpy.context.object; sh.name = _NAME + '_shelf_' + str(i)
            sh.scale = (_W - 2 * pt, _D, pt)
            bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
            sh.data.materials.append(wood)
        # 排书：从左到右，每本随机宽 5~15cm，高 18~28cm，厚 = 等于剩余层高
        book_z = z_shelf + (span - pt) * 0.5 + pt * 0.5
        cx = _LOC[0] - _W * 0.5 + pt + 0.02
        while cx < _LOC[0] + _W * 0.5 - pt - 0.04:
            bw = 0.025 + random.random() * 0.04
            bh = (span - pt) * (0.78 + random.random() * 0.18)
            bd = _D * (0.7 + random.random() * 0.2)
            bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(cx + bw * 0.5, _LOC[1], z_shelf + bh * 0.5 + pt * 0.5))
            book = bpy.context.object; book.name = _NAME + '_book'
            book.scale = (bw, bd, bh)
            bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
            bm = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_book_mat')
            bm.use_nodes = True
            bb = bm.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
            if bb and 'Base Color' in bb.inputs:
                bb.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (random.random() * 0.8 + 0.1, random.random() * 0.7 + 0.1, random.random() * 0.7 + 0.1, 1.0)
            if bb and 'Roughness' in bb.inputs:
                bb.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.55
            book.data.materials.append(bm)
            cx += bw + 0.003
    print('[apply_template] bookshelf_full 完成')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] bookshelf_full 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: bed_full
templates.title: 完整床（床架+床垫+枕头x2+被子）
templates.description: 床架（4 床腿 + 床框 + 床头板） + 床垫（subsurf 软包） + 2 个枕头 + 被子覆盖。
templates.code:
import bpy
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _L = float({{length}})
    _W = float({{width}})
    _SC = {{sheet_color|json}}

    wood = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_wood')
    wood.use_nodes = True
    b = wood.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.45, 0.30, 0.20, 1.0)

    fabric = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_fabric')
    fabric.use_nodes = True
    bf = fabric.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bf and 'Base Color' in bf.inputs:
        bf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_SC[0], _SC[1], _SC[2], 1.0)
    if bf and 'Roughness' in bf.inputs:
        bf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.85

    pillow_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_pillow')
    pillow_mat.use_nodes = True
    bp = pillow_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bp and 'Base Color' in bp.inputs:
        bp.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (1.0, 1.0, 0.98, 1.0)
    if bp and 'Roughness' in bp.inputs:
        bp.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.85

    # 4 床腿
    leg_h = 0.18
    for sx in [-1, 1]:
        for sy in [-1, 1]:
            bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] + sx * (_W * 0.5 - 0.05), _LOC[1] + sy * (_L * 0.5 - 0.05), _LOC[2] + leg_h * 0.5))
            lg = bpy.context.object; lg.name = _NAME + '_leg'
            lg.scale = (0.08, 0.08, leg_h)
            bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
            lg.data.materials.append(wood)

    # 床框
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + leg_h + 0.04))
    frame = bpy.context.object; frame.name = _NAME + '_frame'
    frame.scale = (_W, _L, 0.08)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bv = frame.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.01; bv.segments = 2
    frame.data.materials.append(wood)

    # 床头板
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] - _L * 0.5, _LOC[2] + leg_h + 0.50))
    hb = bpy.context.object; hb.name = _NAME + '_headboard'
    hb.scale = (_W, 0.05, 1.0)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bv = hb.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.015; bv.segments = 2
    hb.data.materials.append(wood)

    # 床垫
    mat_h = 0.20
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + leg_h + 0.08 + mat_h * 0.5))
    mat_obj = bpy.context.object; mat_obj.name = _NAME + '_mattress'
    mat_obj.scale = (_W - 0.05, _L - 0.05, mat_h)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bv = mat_obj.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.04; bv.segments = 3
    sub = mat_obj.modifiers.new('Sub', 'SUBSURF'); sub.levels = 2
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    mat_obj.data.materials.append(pillow_mat)

    # 被子（盖在床垫上 2/3）
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] + _L * 0.15, _LOC[2] + leg_h + 0.08 + mat_h + 0.03))
    quilt = bpy.context.object; quilt.name = _NAME + '_quilt'
    quilt.scale = (_W - 0.03, _L * 0.6, 0.06)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bv = quilt.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.025; bv.segments = 3
    sub = quilt.modifiers.new('Sub', 'SUBSURF'); sub.levels = 2
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    quilt.data.materials.append(fabric)

    # 2 个枕头
    for sx in [-1, 1]:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] + sx * _W * 0.22, _LOC[1] - _L * 0.32, _LOC[2] + leg_h + 0.08 + mat_h + 0.06))
        p = bpy.context.object; p.name = _NAME + '_pillow'
        p.scale = (_W * 0.35, _L * 0.18, 0.08)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        bv = p.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.03; bv.segments = 3; bv.profile = 0.7
        sub = p.modifiers.new('Sub', 'SUBSURF'); sub.levels = 3
        bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
        p.data.materials.append(pillow_mat)
    print('[apply_template] bed_full 完成: ' + str(_W) + 'x' + str(_L) + 'm')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] bed_full 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: curtain_pleated
templates.title: 褶皱窗帘（Plane + Wave + Subsurf）
templates.description: 立式 plane 高度细分 + Wave modifier（沿 X 方向波浪） + Subsurf 平滑，形成下垂窗帘的褶皱。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _W = float({{width}})
    _H = float({{height}})
    _C = {{color|json}}

    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=1, location=_LOC)
    obj = bpy.context.object; obj.name = _NAME
    obj.rotation_euler = (math.radians(90), 0, 0)
    obj.scale = (_W, _H, 1.0)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=True)
    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
    bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
    bpy.ops.mesh.subdivide(number_cuts=30)
    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

    # Wave 褶皱（X 方向）
    wave = obj.modifiers.new('Wave', 'WAVE')
    wave.use_x = True; wave.use_y = False
    wave.height = 0.06
    wave.width = 0.30
    wave.narrowness = 1.5
    wave.speed = 0

    so = obj.modifiers.new('Solid', 'SOLIDIFY')
    so.thickness = 0.01
    sub = obj.modifiers.new('Sub', 'SUBSURF')
    sub.levels = 2
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()

    mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
    mat.use_nodes = True
    b = mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_C[0], _C[1], _C[2], 1.0)
    if b and 'Roughness' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.9
    obj.data.materials.append(mat)
    print('[apply_template] curtain_pleated 完成: ' + str(_W) + 'x' + str(_H) + 'm')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] curtain_pleated 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: studio_seamless_bg
templates.title: 无缝背景纸（白/灰/黑大 cyclorama 弧形过渡）
templates.description: 摄影棚标准 cyclorama：地面 plane + 后立面 plane + 中间一段圆弧过渡（无缝），shade=neutral 单色 + 极低反射。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _W = float({{width}})
    _D = float({{depth}})
    _H = float({{height}})
    _K = {{kind|json}}

    color_map = {'white': (0.95, 0.95, 0.95), 'gray': (0.45, 0.45, 0.45), 'black': (0.04, 0.04, 0.04)}
    c = color_map.get(_K, (0.95, 0.95, 0.95))
    mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
    mat.use_nodes = True
    b = mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (c[0], c[1], c[2], 1.0)
    if b and 'Roughness' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.85

    parts = []
    # 地面
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] + _D * 0.5, _LOC[2]))
    floor = bpy.context.object; floor.name = _NAME + '_floor'
    floor.scale = (_W, _D, 1.0)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    parts.append(floor)
    # 立面
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] + _D, _LOC[2] + _H * 0.5))
    back = bpy.context.object; back.name = _NAME + '_back'
    back.rotation_euler = (math.radians(90), 0, 0)
    back.scale = (_W, _H, 1.0)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=True)
    parts.append(back)
    # 圆弧过渡（cylinder 分段四分之一）
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.6, depth=_W, vertices=24, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] + _D - 0.6, _LOC[2] + 0.6))
    arc = bpy.context.object; arc.name = _NAME + '_arc'
    arc.rotation_euler = (0, math.radians(90), 0)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=False)
    parts.append(arc)

    for p in parts:
        p.data.materials.append(mat)
    print('[apply_template] studio_seamless_bg 完成: ' + _K + ' ' + str(_W) + 'x' + str(_D) + 'x' + str(_H))
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] studio_seamless_bg 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: studio_softbox
templates.title: 柔光箱（金字塔形 cube + 前发光 plane + 灯架）
templates.description: 金字塔形外壳（cone scaled）+ 前面发光 plane（高强度 Emission）+ 真实 Area Light，最常用的主光形态。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
from mathutils import Vector
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _S = float({{size}})
    _STR = float({{strength}})
    _AIM = {{aim_at|json}}

    body_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_body_mat')
    body_mat.use_nodes = True
    b = body_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.05, 0.05, 0.05, 1.0)
    if b and 'Roughness' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.6

    em_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_em_mat')
    em_mat.use_nodes = True
    nt = em_mat.node_tree
    for n in list(nt.nodes):
        nt.nodes.remove(n)
    out = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeOutputMaterial')
    em = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeEmission')
    if 'Color' in em.inputs:
        em.inputs['Color'].default_value = (1.0, 0.98, 0.95, 1.0)
    if 'Strength' in em.inputs:
        em.inputs['Strength'].default_value = 5.0
    nt.links.new(em.outputs['Emission'], out.inputs['Surface'])

    # 金字塔形外壳（cone radius1=大，radius2=小，倒置）
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cone_add(radius1=_S * 0.7, radius2=_S * 0.55, depth=_S * 0.7, vertices=4, location=_LOC)
    body = bpy.context.object; body.name = _NAME + '_body'
    body.data.materials.append(body_mat)

    # 前发光面
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=_S, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _S * 0.36))
    face = bpy.context.object; face.name = _NAME + '_face'
    face.data.materials.append(em_mat)

    # Area Light
    bpy.ops.object.light_add(type='AREA', location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _S * 0.36))
    lt = bpy.context.object; lt.name = _NAME + '_light'
    lt.data.shape = 'SQUARE'
    lt.data.size = _S
    lt.data.energy = _STR
    lt.data.color = (1.0, 0.98, 0.95)

    # Track To 对准 aim 目标
    bpy.ops.object.empty_add(type='PLAIN_AXES', location=tuple(_AIM))
    target = bpy.context.object; target.name = _NAME + '_aim'
    for o in [body, face, lt]:
        con = o.constraints.new('TRACK_TO')
        con.target = target
        con.track_axis = 'TRACK_NEGATIVE_Z'
        con.up_axis = 'UP_Y'
    print('[apply_template] studio_softbox 完成: size=' + str(_S) + ' energy=' + str(_STR))
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] studio_softbox 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: studio_umbrella
templates.title: 反光伞（cone 球面 + 内 silver/white + Area Light）
templates.description: 圆锥形外壳（cone）+ 内表面银/白色 + 顶部 Spot Light 或 Area Light 朝伞内打光。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _S = float({{size}})
    _C = {{color|json}}
    _STR = float({{strength}})

    inside_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_inside_mat')
    inside_mat.use_nodes = True
    b = inside_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_C[0], _C[1], _C[2], 1.0)
    if b and 'Metallic' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Metallic'].default_value = 0.85 if max(_C) > 0.7 and abs(_C[0] - _C[1]) < 0.1 else 0.2
    if b and 'Roughness' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.4

    # 伞（cone）
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cone_add(radius1=_S * 0.5, radius2=0, depth=_S * 0.7, vertices=24, location=_LOC)
    umb = bpy.context.object; umb.name = _NAME + '_umb'
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    # 反转法线让内表面朝外
    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
    bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
    bpy.ops.mesh.flip_normals()
    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')
    umb.data.materials.append(inside_mat)

    # Area Light（朝伞内）
    bpy.ops.object.light_add(type='AREA', location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] - _S * 0.2))
    lt = bpy.context.object; lt.name = _NAME + '_light'
    lt.data.size = _S * 0.7
    lt.data.energy = _STR
    print('[apply_template] studio_umbrella 完成: size=' + str(_S))
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] studio_umbrella 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: studio_light_stand
templates.title: C-stand 灯架（三脚底 + 升降柱 + 横臂）
templates.description: 三脚底（3 根斜柱） + 中央立柱（cylinder 多段） + 顶部水平横臂 + 横臂末端球形夹具。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _H = float({{height}})

    metal = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
    metal.use_nodes = True
    b = metal.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.05, 0.05, 0.05, 1.0)
    if b and 'Metallic' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Metallic'].default_value = 0.6
    if b and 'Roughness' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.4

    # 三脚
    for i in range(3):
        ang = i * 2 * math.pi / 3
        ex = math.cos(ang) * 0.45
        ey = math.sin(ang) * 0.45
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.015, depth=0.55, vertices=10, location=(_LOC[0] + ex * 0.5, _LOC[1] + ey * 0.5, _LOC[2] + 0.20))
        leg = bpy.context.object; leg.name = _NAME + '_leg_' + str(i + 1)
        # 朝外+略下倾
        leg.rotation_euler = (math.radians(20) * math.cos(ang), math.radians(20) * math.sin(ang), 0)
        leg.data.materials.append(metal)

    # 立柱
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.022, depth=_H, vertices=12, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H * 0.5))
    pole = bpy.context.object; pole.name = _NAME + '_pole'
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    pole.data.materials.append(metal)

    # 横臂
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.015, depth=0.8, vertices=10, location=(_LOC[0] + 0.4, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H - 0.05))
    arm = bpy.context.object; arm.name = _NAME + '_arm'
    arm.rotation_euler = (0, math.radians(90), 0)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=False)
    arm.data.materials.append(metal)

    # 末端夹具

    knob = bpy.context.object; knob.name = _NAME + '_knob'
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    knob.data.materials.append(metal)
    print('[apply_template] studio_light_stand 完成')
except Exception as _e:
