templates.name: studio_tripod_camera
templates.title: 三脚架 + 相机（3 腿 + 云台 + 相机机身镜头）
templates.description: 3 腿三脚架 + 中央云台 + 一台 DSLR/无反相机（机身 cube + 镜头 cylinder + 闪光灯小 cube），自动添加 Blender Camera 对象。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _H = float({{height}})
    _AIM = {{aim_at|json}}

    metal = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_metal')
    metal.use_nodes = True
    b = metal.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.10, 0.10, 0.10, 1.0)
    if b and 'Metallic' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Metallic'].default_value = 0.5

    # 3 脚
    for i in range(3):
        ang = i * 2 * math.pi / 3
        ex = math.cos(ang) * 0.5
        ey = math.sin(ang) * 0.5
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.012, depth=_H, vertices=8, location=(_LOC[0] + ex * 0.5, _LOC[1] + ey * 0.5, _LOC[2] + _H * 0.5))
        lg = bpy.context.object; lg.name = _NAME + '_leg_' + str(i + 1)
        lg.rotation_euler = (math.radians(15) * math.sin(ang), -math.radians(15) * math.cos(ang), 0)
        lg.data.materials.append(metal)

    # 云台
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_uv_sphere_add(radius=0.04, segments=16, ring_count=8, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H + 0.04))
    head = bpy.context.object; head.name = _NAME + '_head'
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    head.data.materials.append(metal)

    # 相机机身
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H + 0.13))
    body = bpy.context.object; body.name = _NAME + '_camera_body'
    body.scale = (0.14, 0.10, 0.10)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bv = body.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.005; bv.segments = 2
    body.data.materials.append(metal)

    # 镜头
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.04, depth=0.10, vertices=20, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] + 0.10, _LOC[2] + _H + 0.13))
    lens = bpy.context.object; lens.name = _NAME + '_lens'
    lens.rotation_euler = (math.radians(90), 0, 0)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=False)
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    lens.data.materials.append(metal)

    # 真实 Blender Camera
    bpy.ops.object.camera_add(location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] + 0.08, _LOC[2] + _H + 0.13))
    cam = bpy.context.object; cam.name = _NAME + '_render_cam'
    cam.data.lens = 50
    # Track To AIM
    bpy.ops.object.empty_add(type='PLAIN_AXES', location=tuple(_AIM))
    target = bpy.context.object; target.name = _NAME + '_aim'
    con = cam.constraints.new('TRACK_TO')
    con.target = target
    con.track_axis = 'TRACK_NEGATIVE_Z'
    con.up_axis = 'UP_Y'
    bpy.context.scene.camera = cam
    print('[apply_template] studio_tripod_camera 完成（已 set as scene camera）')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] studio_tripod_camera 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

import bpy
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _S = float({{size}})
    _SP = float({{spacing}})

    mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
    mat.use_nodes = True
    b = mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.10, 0.10, 0.10, 1.0)
    if b and 'Roughness' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.5

    n = max(2, int(_S / _SP))
    # 横向条
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] - _S * 0.5 + _SP * 0.5, _LOC[2]))
    h = bpy.context.object; h.name = _NAME + '_h'
    h.scale = (_S, 0.04, 0.04)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    arr = h.modifiers.new('Arr', 'ARRAY')
    arr.use_relative_offset = False
    arr.use_constant_offset = True
    arr.constant_offset_displace = (0, _SP, 0)
    arr.count = n
    h.data.materials.append(mat)
    # 纵向条
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] - _S * 0.5 + _SP * 0.5, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + 0.05))
    v = bpy.context.object; v.name = _NAME + '_v'
    v.scale = (0.04, _S, 0.04)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    arr2 = v.modifiers.new('Arr', 'ARRAY')
    arr2.use_relative_offset = False
    arr2.use_constant_offset = True
    arr2.constant_offset_displace = (_SP, 0, 0)
    arr2.count = n
    v.data.materials.append(mat)
    print('[apply_template] studio_grid_ceiling 完成: ' + str(n) + 'x' + str(n))
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] studio_grid_ceiling 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.code:
import bpy
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _FS = float({{fog_size}})
    _D = float({{density}})

    # 机器
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=_LOC)
    box = bpy.context.object; box.name = _NAME + '_box'
    box.scale = (0.40, 0.30, 0.20)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bv = box.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.01; bv.segments = 2
    box_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_box_mat')
    box_mat.use_nodes = True
    b = box_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.05, 0.05, 0.05, 1.0)
    box.data.materials.append(box_mat)

    # 出风口（小 cylinder 朝前）
    import math
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.06, depth=0.05, vertices=12, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] - 0.18, _LOC[2]))
    out = bpy.context.object; out.name = _NAME + '_outlet'
    out.rotation_euler = (math.radians(90), 0, 0)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=False)
    out.data.materials.append(box_mat)

    # 雾域
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] - _FS * 0.5 - 0.5, _LOC[2] + _FS * 0.3))
    vol = bpy.context.object; vol.name = _NAME + '_volume'
    vol.scale = (_FS, _FS, _FS * 0.6)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    vol.display_type = 'WIRE'
    v_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_vol_mat')
    v_mat.use_nodes = True
    nt = v_mat.node_tree
    for n in list(nt.nodes):
        nt.nodes.remove(n)
    out_n = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeOutputMaterial')
    vs = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeVolumeScatter')
    if 'Density' in vs.inputs:
        vs.inputs['Density'].default_value = _D
    if 'Color' in vs.inputs:
        vs.inputs['Color'].default_value = (1, 1, 1, 1)
    nt.links.new(vs.outputs['Volume'], out_n.inputs['Volume'])
    vol.data.materials.append(v_mat)
    print('[apply_template] studio_smoke_machine 完成')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] studio_smoke_machine 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.code:
import bpy
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _H = float({{height}})
    _R = float({{radius}})
    _C = {{color|json}}
    _S = float({{strength}})

    em_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_em_mat')
    em_mat.use_nodes = True
    nt = em_mat.node_tree
    for n in list(nt.nodes):
        nt.nodes.remove(n)
    out = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeOutputMaterial')
    em = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeEmission')
    if 'Color' in em.inputs:
        em.inputs['Color'].default_value = (_C[0], _C[1], _C[2], 1.0)
    if 'Strength' in em.inputs:
        em.inputs['Strength'].default_value = _S
    tr = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeBsdfTransparent')
    mix = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeMixShader')
    mix.inputs[0].default_value = 0.4
    nt.links.new(tr.outputs['BSDF'], mix.inputs[1])
    nt.links.new(em.outputs['Emission'], mix.inputs[2])
    nt.links.new(mix.outputs['Shader'], out.inputs['Surface'])
    em_mat.blend_method = 'BLEND'

    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=_R, depth=_H, vertices=20, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H * 0.5))

    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    obj.data.materials.append(em_mat)

    # 底部+顶部小球（端点能量团）
    for sz in [0, _H]:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_uv_sphere_add(radius=_R * 1.5, segments=16, ring_count=8, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + sz))
        bp = bpy.context.object; bp.name = _NAME + '_orb'
        bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
        bp.data.materials.append(em_mat)
    print('[apply_template] energy_beam 完成: h=' + str(_H) + ' r=' + str(_R))
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] energy_beam 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: floating_island
templates.title: 浮岛（IcoSphere 上扁下尖 + Displace + 草地顶面）
templates.description: ico_sphere subdivide + Displace Voronoi（顶部 flat，底部尖锥状）+ 顶面草地材质 + 侧面岩石材质。RPG/魔幻必用。
templates.code:
import bpy, bmesh
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _S = float({{size}})

    # 主体：ico_sphere → 拉伸 Z 上下做出锥状
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_ico_sphere_add(radius=_S * 0.5, subdivisions=4, location=_LOC)
    obj = bpy.context.object; obj.name = _NAME
    obj.scale = (1.2, 1.2, 0.7)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    # bmesh：底部所有顶点向下拉伸（让底部尖）
    me = obj.data
    bm = bmesh.new()
    bm.from_mesh(me)
    for v in bm.verts:
        if v.co.z < -_S * 0.05:
            v.co.z -= (-v.co.z) * 1.2
    bm.to_mesh(me); bm.free()

    # Displace 增加岩石细节
    tex = bpy.data.textures.new(_NAME + '_tex', 'VORONOI')
    tex.noise_scale = 0.5
    dm = obj.modifiers.new('Disp', 'DISPLACE')
    dm.texture = tex
    dm.strength = _S * 0.05
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()

    # 材质（带顶面草地）
    mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
    mat.use_nodes = True
    nt = mat.node_tree
    bsdf = nt.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    # 顶面绿色，侧面棕色，用 Z 坐标驱动 ColorRamp
    coord = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexCoord')
    sep = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeSeparateXYZ')
    cr = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeValToRGB')
    cr.color_ramp.elements[0].position = 0.4
    cr.color_ramp.elements[0].color = (0.30, 0.18, 0.10, 1)
    cr.color_ramp.elements[1].position = 0.65
    cr.color_ramp.elements[1].color = (0.20, 0.50, 0.15, 1)
    nt.links.new(coord.outputs['Generated'], sep.inputs['Vector'])
    nt.links.new(sep.outputs['Z'], cr.inputs['Fac'])
    if bsdf and 'Base Color' in bsdf.inputs:
        nt.links.new(cr.outputs['Color'], bsdf.inputs['Base Color'])
    if bsdf and 'Roughness' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.85
    obj.data.materials.append(mat)
    print('[apply_template] floating_island 完成: size=' + str(_S))
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] floating_island 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: crystal_cluster

templates.name: broken_floor_crack
templates.title: 地面裂痕（Plane subdivide + Voronoi Displace 凹陷）
templates.description: 地面 plane + Voronoi 边缘距离 → Displace 朝下凹陷一条裂缝，再叠红色自发光（仅裂缝内）模拟岩浆/能量。
templates.code:
import bpy
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _S = float({{size}})
    _L = bool({{lava}})

    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=_S, location=_LOC)
    obj = bpy.context.object; obj.name = _NAME
    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
    bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
    bpy.ops.mesh.subdivide(number_cuts=50)
    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')
    tex = bpy.data.textures.new(_NAME + '_tex', 'VORONOI')
    tex.distance_metric = 'DISTANCE_SQUARED'
    tex.noise_scale = 0.6
    dm = obj.modifiers.new('Disp', 'DISPLACE')
    dm.texture = tex
    dm.strength = -0.15
    dm.mid_level = 0.0

    mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
    mat.use_nodes = True
    nt = mat.node_tree
    bsdf = nt.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bsdf and 'Base Color' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.20, 0.18, 0.16, 1.0)
    if bsdf and 'Roughness' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.9
    if _L:
        # Voronoi 边缘 → ColorRamp → Emission Mix
        vor = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexVoronoi')
        vor.feature = 'DISTANCE_TO_EDGE'
        vor.inputs['Scale'].default_value = 4.0
        cr = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeValToRGB')
        cr.color_ramp.elements[0].color = (1.0, 0.30, 0.05, 1)
        cr.color_ramp.elements[1].color = (0.05, 0.04, 0.04, 1)
        cr.color_ramp.elements[0].position = 0.0
        cr.color_ramp.elements[1].position = 0.05
        nt.links.new(vor.outputs['Distance'], cr.inputs['Fac'])
        if bsdf and 'Base Color' in bsdf.inputs:
            nt.links.new(cr.outputs['Color'], bsdf.inputs['Base Color'])
        # Emission：bsdf 4.x 自带 Emission 输入
        em_cr = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeValToRGB')
        em_cr.color_ramp.elements[0].color = (1.0, 0.30, 0.05, 1)
        em_cr.color_ramp.elements[1].color = (0, 0, 0, 1)
        em_cr.color_ramp.elements[0].position = 0.0
        em_cr.color_ramp.elements[1].position = 0.05
        nt.links.new(vor.outputs['Distance'], em_cr.inputs['Fac'])
        for k in ['Emission', 'Emission Color']:
            if bsdf and k in bsdf.inputs:
                nt.links.new(em_cr.outputs['Color'], bsdf.inputs[k])
                break
        if bsdf and 'Emission Strength' in bsdf.inputs:
            bsdf.inputs['Emission Strength'].default_value = 8.0
    obj.data.materials.append(mat)
    print('[apply_template] broken_floor_crack 完成: lava=' + str(_L))
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] broken_floor_crack 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: portal_swirl
templates.title: 传送门漩涡（圆环 cylinder + 漩涡 plane + 自发光）
templates.description: 外圈圆环（torus 扁） + 中央漩涡 plane（半透螺旋色）+ 内部 Point Light。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _R = float({{radius}})
    _C = {{color|json}}

    em_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_em_mat')
    em_mat.use_nodes = True
    nt = em_mat.node_tree
    for n in list(nt.nodes):
        nt.nodes.remove(n)
    out = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeOutputMaterial')
    em = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeEmission')
    if 'Color' in em.inputs:
        em.inputs['Color'].default_value = (_C[0], _C[1], _C[2], 1.0)
    if 'Strength' in em.inputs:
        em.inputs['Strength'].default_value = 8.0
    nt.links.new(em.outputs['Emission'], out.inputs['Surface'])

    # 外圈
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_torus_add(major_radius=_R, minor_radius=_R * 0.05, major_segments=48, minor_segments=8, location=_LOC)
    ring = bpy.context.object; ring.name = _NAME + '_ring'
    ring.rotation_euler = (math.radians(90), 0, 0)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=False)
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    ring.data.materials.append(em_mat)

    # 中央 plane
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_circle_add(radius=_R * 0.95, vertices=48, fill_type='NGON', location=_LOC)
    pl = bpy.context.object; pl.name = _NAME + '_swirl'
    pl.rotation_euler = (math.radians(90), 0, 0)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=False)
    # 漩涡材质（用 Wave + Mapping rotate）
    sw_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_sw_mat')
    sw_mat.use_nodes = True
    nt2 = sw_mat.node_tree
    for n in list(nt2.nodes):
        nt2.nodes.remove(n)
    out2 = nt2.nodes.new('ShaderNodeOutputMaterial')
    em2 = nt2.nodes.new('ShaderNodeEmission')
    if 'Color' in em2.inputs:
        em2.inputs['Color'].default_value = (_C[0] * 0.5, _C[1] * 0.5, _C[2], 1.0)
    if 'Strength' in em2.inputs:
        em2.inputs['Strength'].default_value = 5.0
    coord = nt2.nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexCoord')
    map_n = nt2.nodes.new('ShaderNodeMapping')
    wave = nt2.nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexWave')
    wave.wave_type = 'RINGS'
    wave.inputs['Scale'].default_value = 4.0
    wave.inputs['Distortion'].default_value = 5.0
    nt2.links.new(coord.outputs['Object'], map_n.inputs['Vector'])
    nt2.links.new(map_n.outputs['Vector'], wave.inputs['Vector'])
    nt2.links.new(wave.outputs['Color'], em2.inputs['Color'])
    nt2.links.new(em2.outputs['Emission'], out2.inputs['Surface'])
    pl.data.materials.append(sw_mat)

    bpy.ops.object.light_add(type='POINT', location=_LOC)
    lt = bpy.context.object; lt.name = _NAME + '_light'
    lt.data.energy = 200
    lt.data.color = (_C[0], _C[1], _C[2])
    print('[apply_template] portal_swirl 完成')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] portal_swirl 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

import bpy, math, random
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}

    em_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_em_mat')

        nt.nodes.remove(n)
    out = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeOutputMaterial')
    em = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeEmission')
    if 'Color' in em.inputs:
        em.inputs['Color'].default_value = (_C[0], _C[1], _C[2], 1.0)
    if 'Strength' in em.inputs:
        em.inputs['Strength'].default_value = 25.0
    nt.links.new(em.outputs['Emission'], out.inputs['Surface'])

    n_seg = 6
    pts = [(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2])]
    for i in range(n_seg):
        prev = pts[-1]
        dx = (random.random() - 0.5) * 0.3
        dy = (random.random() - 0.5) * 0.3
        dz = -_L / n_seg
        pts.append((prev[0] + dx, prev[1] + dy, prev[2] + dz))
    for i in range(n_seg):
        x1, y1, z1 = pts[i]
        x2, y2, z2 = pts[i + 1]
        mx, my, mz = (x1 + x2) / 2, (y1 + y2) / 2, (z1 + z2) / 2
        dist = math.sqrt((x2 - x1) ** 2 + (y2 - y1) ** 2 + (z2 - z1) ** 2)
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.025, depth=dist, vertices=6, location=(mx, my, mz))
        seg = bpy.context.object; seg.name = _NAME + '_seg_' + str(i + 1)
        # 朝向
        from mathutils import Vector
        direction = Vector((x2 - x1, y2 - y1, z2 - z1))
        seg.rotation_euler = direction.to_track_quat('Z', 'X').to_euler()
        seg.data.materials.append(em_mat)
    print('[apply_template] lightning_bolt 完成: ' + str(n_seg) + ' 段')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] lightning_bolt 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: ribbon_streamer

templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _L = float({{length}})
    _W = float({{width}})

    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=1, location=_LOC)

    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
    bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
    bpy.ops.mesh.subdivide(number_cuts=40)

    wave = obj.modifiers.new('Wave', 'WAVE')

    mat.use_nodes = True

    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_C[0], _C[1], _C[2], 1.0)
    if b and 'Roughness' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.5
    obj.data.materials.append(mat)
    print('[apply_template] ribbon_streamer 完成: ' + str(_L) + 'x' + str(_W))
except Exception as _e:

templates.name: ruined_pillar
templates.title: 残破石柱（cylinder 顶部断裂 + Voronoi Displace 风化）
templates.description: cylinder 主体 + 顶部用 bisect 切斜面（断裂感） + Voronoi 噪波 Displace 表面风化 + 灰白石材。
templates.code:
import bpy, math, random
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _H = float({{height}})
    _R = float({{radius}})

    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=_R, depth=_H, vertices=20, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H * 0.5))
    obj = bpy.context.object; obj.name = _NAME
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    # Voronoi 风化
    tex = bpy.data.textures.new(_NAME + '_tex', 'VORONOI')
    tex.noise_scale = 0.4
    dm = obj.modifiers.new('Disp', 'DISPLACE')
    dm.texture = tex
    dm.strength = _R * 0.15
    # 顶部断裂感：用 Edit mode bisect
    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
    bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
    angle = random.random() * 0.4 - 0.2
    bpy.ops.mesh.bisect(plane_co=(0, 0, _H * 0.95), plane_no=(angle, angle, 1), use_fill=True, clear_outer=True)
    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

    mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
    mat.use_nodes = True
    b = mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.65, 0.62, 0.55, 1.0)
    if b and 'Roughness' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.92
    obj.data.materials.append(mat)
    print('[apply_template] ruined_pillar 完成: h=' + str(_H))
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] ruined_pillar 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: medieval_castle_tower
templates.title: 中世纪塔楼（圆柱主体 + 锥顶 + 雉堞 + 窗孔）
templates.description: 圆柱主体（高） + 顶部锥形屋顶 + 一圈方形雉堞（cube Array 绕圆环） + 几个矩形窗孔。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _H = float({{height}})
    _R = float({{radius}})

    stone = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_stone')
    stone.use_nodes = True
    b = stone.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.55, 0.50, 0.45, 1.0)
    if b and 'Roughness' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.9

    roof = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_roof')
    roof.use_nodes = True
    br = roof.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if br and 'Base Color' in br.inputs:
        br.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.30, 0.18, 0.12, 1.0)

    # 主体
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=_R, depth=_H, vertices=24, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H * 0.5))
    body = bpy.context.object; body.name = _NAME + '_body'
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    body.data.materials.append(stone)

    # 锥顶
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cone_add(radius1=_R * 1.1, radius2=0, depth=_R * 1.5, vertices=24, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H + _R * 0.75))
    cone = bpy.context.object; cone.name = _NAME + '_roof'
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    cone.data.materials.append(roof)

    # 雉堞（一圈小 cube）
    for i in range(12):
        ang = i * 2 * math.pi / 12
        x = _LOC[0] + math.cos(ang) * _R
        y = _LOC[1] + math.sin(ang) * _R
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(x, y, _LOC[2] + _H + 0.15))
        c = bpy.context.object; c.name = _NAME + '_battle_' + str(i + 1)
        c.scale = (0.20, 0.20, 0.30)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        c.data.materials.append(stone)
    print('[apply_template] medieval_castle_tower 完成')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] medieval_castle_tower 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: wooden_house_facade
templates.title: 木屋立面（墙体 + 三角屋顶 + 门 + 2 窗）
templates.description: 矩形墙体（3D cube） + 山墙顶（三角棱柱实现） + 居中门（cube 凹陷） + 左右两扇方窗（带十字木条）。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _W = float({{width}})
    _D = float({{depth}})
    _H = float({{wall_h}})

    wall_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_wall')
    wall_mat.use_nodes = True
    b = wall_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.65, 0.50, 0.35, 1.0)
    if b and 'Roughness' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.75

    roof_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_roof')
    roof_mat.use_nodes = True
    br = roof_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if br and 'Base Color' in br.inputs:
        br.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.30, 0.20, 0.15, 1.0)

    # 墙体
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H * 0.5))
    wall = bpy.context.object; wall.name = _NAME + '_wall'
    wall.scale = (_W, _D, _H)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    wall.data.materials.append(wall_mat)

    # 屋顶（三棱柱：用 cube + bisect 简化为 cone radius1 长方形版）
    # 这里用 2 个倾斜 plane 拼山墙顶
    roof_h = _W * 0.4
    # 顶左右斜面
    for sx in [-1, 1]:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] + sx * _W * 0.25, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + _H + roof_h * 0.5))
        r = bpy.context.object; r.name = _NAME + '_roof_' + ('R' if sx > 0 else 'L')
        r.rotation_euler = (0, sx * math.atan(roof_h / (_W * 0.5)), 0)
        r.scale = (_W * 0.55, _D + 0.3, 1.0)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=True)
        r.data.materials.append(roof_mat)

    # 门
    door_w = 0.8; door_h = 1.9
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] - _D * 0.5 - 0.005, _LOC[2] + door_h * 0.5))
    door = bpy.context.object; door.name = _NAME + '_door'
    door.scale = (door_w, 0.04, door_h)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    door_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_door_mat')
    door_mat.use_nodes = True
    bd = door_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bd and 'Base Color' in bd.inputs:
        bd.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.30, 0.20, 0.12, 1.0)
    door.data.materials.append(door_mat)

    # 2 窗
    win_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_win_mat')
    win_mat.use_nodes = True
    bw = win_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bw and 'Base Color' in bw.inputs:
        bw.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.85, 0.92, 0.98, 1.0)
    if bw and 'Roughness' in bw.inputs:
        bw.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.05
    for sx in [-1, 1]:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] + sx * _W * 0.32, _LOC[1] - _D * 0.5 - 0.005, _LOC[2] + _H * 0.55))
        wn = bpy.context.object; wn.name = _NAME + '_win_' + ('R' if sx > 0 else 'L')
        wn.scale = (0.6, 0.04, 0.6)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        wn.data.materials.append(win_mat)
    print('[apply_template] wooden_house_facade 完成')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] wooden_house_facade 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: brick_wall_aged

templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _W = float({{width}})
    _H = float({{height}})
    _T = float({{thickness}})

    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=_LOC)
    obj = bpy.context.object; obj.name = _NAME
    obj.scale = (_W, _T, _H)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)

    mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
    mat.use_nodes = True
    nt = mat.node_tree
    bsdf = nt.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    brick = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexBrick')
    brick.inputs['Color1'].default_value = (0.55, 0.30, 0.22, 1)
    brick.inputs['Color2'].default_value = (0.50, 0.28, 0.20, 1)
    brick.inputs['Mortar'].default_value = (0.40, 0.40, 0.38, 1)
    brick.inputs['Scale'].default_value = 8.0
    brick.inputs['Mortar Size'].default_value = 0.025
    if bsdf and 'Base Color' in bsdf.inputs:
        nt.links.new(brick.outputs['Color'], bsdf.inputs['Base Color'])
    if bsdf and 'Roughness' in bsdf.inputs:
        bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.92
    bump = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeBump')
    bump.inputs['Strength'].default_value = 0.5
    nt.links.new(brick.outputs['Fac'], bump.inputs['Height'])
    if bsdf and 'Normal' in bsdf.inputs:
        nt.links.new(bump.outputs['Normal'], bsdf.inputs['Normal'])
    obj.data.materials.append(mat)
    print('[apply_template] brick_wall_aged 完成: ' + str(_W) + 'x' + str(_H) + 'm')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] brick_wall_aged 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: roof_tiles
templates.title: 屋顶瓦片（半圆 cylinder Array X+Y）
templates.description: 半圆形瓦片（cylinder vertices=8 横置裁半） + Array 双向重复，赤陶红色。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _W = float({{width}})
    _D = float({{depth}})
    _C = {{color|json}}

    tile_w = 0.10
    tile_d = 0.30
    nx = max(1, int(_W / tile_w))
    ny = max(1, int(_D / tile_d))

    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=tile_w * 0.5, depth=tile_d, vertices=10, location=(_LOC[0] - _W * 0.5 + tile_w * 0.5, _LOC[1] - _D * 0.5 + tile_d * 0.5, _LOC[2] + tile_w * 0.25))
    tile = bpy.context.object; tile.name = _NAME + '_tile'
    tile.rotation_euler = (math.radians(90), 0, 0)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=False)
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    # 用 Edit bisect 切掉下半（只保留拱面）
    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
    bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
    bpy.ops.mesh.bisect(plane_co=(_LOC[0] - _W * 0.5 + tile_w * 0.5, _LOC[1] - _D * 0.5 + tile_d * 0.5, _LOC[2] + tile_w * 0.25), plane_no=(0, 0, -1), use_fill=False, clear_outer=False, clear_inner=True)
    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

    arrx = tile.modifiers.new('Arrx', 'ARRAY')
    arrx.use_relative_offset = False
    arrx.use_constant_offset = True
    arrx.constant_offset_displace = (tile_w * 0.95, 0, 0)
    arrx.count = nx
    arry = tile.modifiers.new('Arry', 'ARRAY')
    arry.use_relative_offset = False
    arry.use_constant_offset = True
    arry.constant_offset_displace = (0, tile_d * 0.85, 0)
    arry.count = ny

    mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
    mat.use_nodes = True
    b = mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_C[0], _C[1], _C[2], 1.0)
    if b and 'Roughness' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.85
    tile.data.materials.append(mat)
    print('[apply_template] roof_tiles 完成: ' + str(nx) + 'x' + str(ny) + ' 块瓦')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] roof_tiles 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: katana_sword
templates.title: 日本刀（剑刃 + 鞘 + 柄 + 穗）
templates.description: 标准日本刀：弧形剑刃（cube + Bevel 让薄） + 长方形剑鞘（黑漆） + 柄（菱形格纹圆柱） + 末端流苏。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _WS = bool({{with_sheath}})
    _BC = {{blade_color|json}}

    blade_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_blade_mat')
    blade_mat.use_nodes = True
    b = blade_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_BC[0], _BC[1], _BC[2], 1.0)
    if b and 'Metallic' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Metallic'].default_value = 0.95
    if b and 'Roughness' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.10

    sheath_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_sheath_mat')
    sheath_mat.use_nodes = True
    bs = sheath_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bs and 'Base Color' in bs.inputs:
        bs.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.04, 0.04, 0.05, 1.0)
    if bs and 'Roughness' in bs.inputs:
        bs.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.30

    handle_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_handle_mat')
    handle_mat.use_nodes = True
    bh = handle_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bh and 'Base Color' in bh.inputs:
        bh.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.55, 0.10, 0.08, 1.0)
    if bh and 'Roughness' in bh.inputs:
        bh.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.7

    blade_len = 0.7
    handle_len = 0.25

    # 刀刃
    if not _WS:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + blade_len * 0.5))
        blade = bpy.context.object; blade.name = _NAME + '_blade'
        blade.scale = (0.02, 0.025, blade_len)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        bv = blade.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.004; bv.segments = 2
        blade.data.materials.append(blade_mat)
    else:
        # 鞘（套住刀身）
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + blade_len * 0.5))
        sh = bpy.context.object; sh.name = _NAME + '_sheath'
        sh.scale = (0.035, 0.05, blade_len)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        bv = sh.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.005; bv.segments = 2
        sh.data.materials.append(sheath_mat)

    # 护手（鍔 tsuba）
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.05, depth=0.012, vertices=12, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] - 0.005))
    guard = bpy.context.object; guard.name = _NAME + '_guard'
    guard.data.materials.append(blade_mat)

    # 柄
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.018, depth=handle_len, vertices=8, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] - handle_len * 0.5 - 0.012))
    handle = bpy.context.object; handle.name = _NAME + '_handle'
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    handle.data.materials.append(handle_mat)

templates.name: bow_arrow
templates.title: 弓 + 箭（弓身 + 弓弦 + 1 支箭）
templates.description: 弓身（Curve Bezier 弧形） + 弓弦（cylinder 细绳） + 1 支箭（cylinder + 头部 cone + 尾部 4 片 plane 当箭羽）。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}

    wood_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_wood')
    wood_mat.use_nodes = True
    b = wood_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.30, 0.18, 0.10, 1.0)
    if b and 'Roughness' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.6

    string_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_string')
    string_mat.use_nodes = True
    bs = string_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bs and 'Base Color' in bs.inputs:
        bs.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.85, 0.82, 0.75, 1.0)

    metal_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_metal')
    metal_mat.use_nodes = True
    bm = metal_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bm and 'Base Color' in bm.inputs:
        bm.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.7, 0.7, 0.72, 1.0)
    if bm and 'Metallic' in bm.inputs:
        bm.inputs['Metallic'].default_value = 0.9

    # 弓身（贝塞尔曲线）
    bpy.ops.curve.primitive_bezier_curve_add(location=_LOC)
    bow = bpy.context.object; bow.name = _NAME + '_bow'
    bow.data.bevel_depth = 0.012
    bow.data.bevel_resolution = 4
    bp = bow.data.splines[0].bezier_points
    bp[0].co = (0, 0, -0.6)
    bp[1].co = (0, 0, 0.6)
    bp[0].handle_left = (0.3, 0, -0.9)
    bp[0].handle_right = (0.3, 0, -0.3)
    bp[1].handle_left = (0.3, 0, 0.3)
    bp[1].handle_right = (0.3, 0, 0.9)
    bow.data.materials.append(wood_mat)

    # 弓弦（直线 cylinder）
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.003, depth=1.2, vertices=6, location=_LOC)
    string = bpy.context.object; string.name = _NAME + '_string'
    string.data.materials.append(string_mat)

    # 箭杆
    arrow_y = -0.2
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.008, depth=0.8, vertices=8, location=(_LOC[0] + 0.4, _LOC[1] + arrow_y, _LOC[2]))
    shaft = bpy.context.object; shaft.name = _NAME + '_shaft'
    shaft.rotation_euler = (0, math.radians(90), 0)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=False)
    shaft.data.materials.append(wood_mat)

    # 箭头（cone）
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cone_add(radius1=0.018, radius2=0, depth=0.06, vertices=8, location=(_LOC[0] + 0.83, _LOC[1] + arrow_y, _LOC[2]))
    tip = bpy.context.object; tip.name = _NAME + '_tip'
    tip.rotation_euler = (0, math.radians(90), 0)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=False)
    tip.data.materials.append(metal_mat)

    # 箭羽（3 片 plane）
    feather_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_feather')
    feather_mat.use_nodes = True
    bf = feather_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bf and 'Base Color' in bf.inputs:
        bf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.85, 0.20, 0.20, 1.0)
    for i in range(3):
        ang = i * math.pi * 2 / 3
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=0.08, location=(_LOC[0] - 0.05, _LOC[1] + arrow_y, _LOC[2]))
        f = bpy.context.object; f.name = _NAME + '_feather_' + str(i + 1)
        f.rotation_euler = (math.radians(90), 0, ang)
        f.scale = (1.0, 0.6, 1.0)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=True)
        f.data.materials.append(feather_mat)
    print('[apply_template] bow_arrow 完成')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] bow_arrow 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.code:
import bpy, bmesh, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _C = {{color|json}}
    _EC = {{emblem_color|json}}

    # 用 bmesh 画 heater shape
    me = bpy.data.meshes.new(_NAME + '_mesh')
    obj = bpy.data.objects.new(_NAME, me)
    bpy.context.collection.objects.link(obj)
    obj.location = _LOC
    bm = bmesh.new()
    verts = [
        bm.verts.new((-0.35,  0,  0.45)),
        bm.verts.new(( 0.35,  0,  0.45)),
        bm.verts.new(( 0.35,  0, -0.05)),
        bm.verts.new(( 0.00,  0, -0.55)),
        bm.verts.new((-0.35,  0, -0.05))
    ]
    bm.faces.new(verts)
    bm.to_mesh(me); bm.free()
    so = obj.modifiers.new('Solid', 'SOLIDIFY'); so.thickness = 0.04
    bv = obj.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.015; bv.segments = 3
    mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_mat')
    mat.use_nodes = True
    b = mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_C[0], _C[1], _C[2], 1.0)
    obj.data.materials.append(mat)

    # 中央十字徽章
    em_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_emblem')
    em_mat.use_nodes = True
    be = em_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if be and 'Base Color' in be.inputs:
        be.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_EC[0], _EC[1], _EC[2], 1.0)
    if be and 'Metallic' in be.inputs:
        be.inputs['Metallic'].default_value = 0.8
    # 十字横+竖
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] - 0.025, _LOC[2]))
    cv = bpy.context.object; cv.name = _NAME + '_emblem_v'
    cv.scale = (0.06, 0.01, 0.30)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    cv.data.materials.append(em_mat)
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] - 0.025, _LOC[2] + 0.10))
    ch = bpy.context.object; ch.name = _NAME + '_emblem_h'
    ch.scale = (0.30, 0.01, 0.06)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    ch.data.materials.append(em_mat)
    print('[apply_template] shield_kite 完成')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] shield_kite 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: car_sedan
templates.title: 轿车（车身 + 4 车轮 + 车窗 + 车头/尾灯）
templates.description: 经典低多边形轿车：底盘 + 中段抬高车顶（cube subdivide 简化）+ 4 个圆柱车轮 + 前后挡风玻璃 plane + 车头灯（白光）+ 尾灯（红）。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _C = {{color|json}}

    body_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_body')
    body_mat.use_nodes = True
    b = body_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_C[0], _C[1], _C[2], 1.0)
    if b and 'Metallic' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Metallic'].default_value = 0.4
    if b and 'Roughness' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.30

    tire_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_tire')
    tire_mat.use_nodes = True
    bt = tire_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bt and 'Base Color' in bt.inputs:
        bt.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.05, 0.05, 0.05, 1.0)
    if bt and 'Roughness' in bt.inputs:
        bt.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.85

    glass_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_glass')
    glass_mat.use_nodes = True
    bg = glass_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bg:
        if 'Base Color' in bg.inputs:
            bg.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.15, 0.25, 0.30, 1.0)
        if 'Roughness' in bg.inputs:
            bg.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.05
        for k in ['Transmission Weight', 'Transmission']:
            if k in bg.inputs:
                bg.inputs[k].default_value = 0.6
                break

    # 底盘（长方形）
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + 0.35))
    body = bpy.context.object; body.name = _NAME + '_body_lower'
    body.scale = (4.2, 1.7, 0.40)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bv = body.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.05; bv.segments = 3
    body.data.materials.append(body_mat)

    # 车顶（缩小 cube）
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] - 0.1, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + 0.85))
    roof = bpy.context.object; roof.name = _NAME + '_roof'
    roof.scale = (2.3, 1.55, 0.50)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bv = roof.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.05; bv.segments = 3
    roof.data.materials.append(body_mat)

    # 4 个车轮
    wheel_r = 0.32
    for sx, sy in [(-1.3, -0.85), (1.3, -0.85), (-1.3, 0.85), (1.3, 0.85)]:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=wheel_r, depth=0.20, vertices=20, location=(_LOC[0] + sx, _LOC[1] + sy, _LOC[2] + wheel_r))
        w = bpy.context.object; w.name = _NAME + '_wheel'
        w.rotation_euler = (math.radians(90), 0, 0)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=False)
        bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
        w.data.materials.append(tire_mat)

    # 挡风玻璃（前后倾斜 plane）
    for sx, ry in [(1.0, math.radians(60)), (-1.2, math.radians(-60))]:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] + sx, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + 0.85))
        gl = bpy.context.object; gl.name = _NAME + '_windshield'
        gl.rotation_euler = (math.radians(90), ry, 0)
        gl.scale = (0.4, 1.50, 1.0)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=True)
        gl.data.materials.append(glass_mat)

    # 车头灯 (白色发光)
    head_em = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_head_em')
    head_em.use_nodes = True
    nt = head_em.node_tree
    for n in list(nt.nodes):
        nt.nodes.remove(n)
    out = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeOutputMaterial')
    em = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeEmission')
    if 'Color' in em.inputs:
        em.inputs['Color'].default_value = (1.0, 0.98, 0.85, 1.0)
    if 'Strength' in em.inputs:
        em.inputs['Strength'].default_value = 8.0
    nt.links.new(em.outputs['Emission'], out.inputs['Surface'])
    for sy in [-0.55, 0.55]:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] + 2.05, _LOC[1] + sy, _LOC[2] + 0.40))
        hl = bpy.context.object; hl.name = _NAME + '_headlight'
        hl.scale = (0.05, 0.15, 0.10)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        hl.data.materials.append(head_em)

    # 尾灯（红色发光）
    tail_em = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_tail_em')
    tail_em.use_nodes = True
    nt2 = tail_em.node_tree
    for n in list(nt2.nodes):
        nt2.nodes.remove(n)
    out2 = nt2.nodes.new('ShaderNodeOutputMaterial')
    em2 = nt2.nodes.new('ShaderNodeEmission')
    if 'Color' in em2.inputs:
        em2.inputs['Color'].default_value = (1.0, 0.10, 0.05, 1.0)
    if 'Strength' in em2.inputs:
        em2.inputs['Strength'].default_value = 5.0
    nt2.links.new(em2.outputs['Emission'], out2.inputs['Surface'])
    for sy in [-0.55, 0.55]:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] - 2.05, _LOC[1] + sy, _LOC[2] + 0.40))
        tl = bpy.context.object; tl.name = _NAME + '_taillight'
        tl.scale = (0.05, 0.15, 0.10)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        tl.data.materials.append(tail_em)
    print('[apply_template] car_sedan 完成')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] car_sedan 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: bicycle
templates.title: 自行车（车架 + 2 轮 + 车把 + 座椅 + 踏板）
templates.description: 三角车架（cylinder 拼接） + 前后 2 个轮（cylinder torus） + 车把 + 座椅 + 1 套踏板。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _C = {{color|json}}

    frame_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_frame')
    frame_mat.use_nodes = True
    b = frame_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_C[0], _C[1], _C[2], 1.0)
    if b and 'Metallic' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Metallic'].default_value = 0.5

    metal_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_metal')
    metal_mat.use_nodes = True
    bm = metal_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bm and 'Base Color' in bm.inputs:
        bm.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.7, 0.7, 0.75, 1.0)
    if bm and 'Metallic' in bm.inputs:
        bm.inputs['Metallic'].default_value = 0.9

    tire_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_tire')
    tire_mat.use_nodes = True
    bt = tire_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bt and 'Base Color' in bt.inputs:
        bt.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.05, 0.05, 0.05, 1.0)

    wheel_r = 0.34
    # 前后轮（torus）
    for sx, name_suf in [(0.55, 'front'), (-0.55, 'rear')]:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_torus_add(major_radius=wheel_r, minor_radius=0.04, major_segments=32, minor_segments=8, location=(_LOC[0] + sx, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + wheel_r))
        tire = bpy.context.object; tire.name = _NAME + '_tire_' + name_suf
        tire.rotation_euler = (math.radians(90), 0, 0)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=False)
        bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
        tire.data.materials.append(tire_mat)
        # 轮毂（小圆盘）
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=wheel_r * 0.85, depth=0.01, vertices=12, location=(_LOC[0] + sx, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + wheel_r))
        hub = bpy.context.object; hub.name = _NAME + '_hub_' + name_suf
        hub.rotation_euler = (math.radians(90), 0, 0)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=False)
        hub.data.materials.append(metal_mat)

    # 三角车架：3 根 cylinder
    def make_tube(p1, p2, r, name_suf):
        import math
        from mathutils import Vector
        v = Vector(p2) - Vector(p1)
        dist = v.length
        mid = (Vector(p1) + Vector(p2)) * 0.5
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=r, depth=dist, vertices=10, location=mid)
        c = bpy.context.object; c.name = _NAME + '_' + name_suf
        c.rotation_euler = v.to_track_quat('Z', 'X').to_euler()
        c.data.materials.append(frame_mat)
        bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
        return c

    # 主车架
    front_hub = (_LOC[0] + 0.55, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + wheel_r)
    rear_hub = (_LOC[0] - 0.55, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + wheel_r)
    seat_top = (_LOC[0] - 0.10, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + 0.85)
    bb_pos = (_LOC[0] - 0.05, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + wheel_r * 0.7)
    make_tube(rear_hub, seat_top, 0.018, 'seat_stay')
    make_tube(rear_hub, bb_pos, 0.018, 'chain_stay')
    make_tube(bb_pos, seat_top, 0.020, 'seat_tube')
    make_tube(bb_pos, front_hub, 0.020, 'down_tube')
    head_top = (_LOC[0] + 0.50, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + 0.85)
    make_tube(seat_top, head_top, 0.020, 'top_tube')
    make_tube(front_hub, head_top, 0.020, 'fork')

    # 车把
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.012, depth=0.45, vertices=8, location=(_LOC[0] + 0.52, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + 0.95))
    handle = bpy.context.object; handle.name = _NAME + '_handle'
    handle.rotation_euler = (math.radians(90), 0, 0)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=False)
    handle.data.materials.append(metal_mat)

    # 座椅
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] - 0.10, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + 0.92))
    seat = bpy.context.object; seat.name = _NAME + '_seat'
    seat.scale = (0.20, 0.08, 0.03)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bv = seat.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.01; bv.segments = 2
    seat.data.materials.append(tire_mat)

    # 踏板（小 cube）
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] - 0.05, _LOC[1] + 0.08, _LOC[2] + 0.20))
    p1 = bpy.context.object; p1.name = _NAME + '_pedal'
    p1.scale = (0.06, 0.03, 0.02)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    p1.data.materials.append(metal_mat)
    print('[apply_template] bicycle 完成')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] bicycle 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

    window_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_window')
    window_mat.use_nodes = True
    bw = window_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bw:
        if 'Base Color' in bw.inputs:
            bw.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.20, 0.30, 0.35, 1.0)
        if 'Roughness' in bw.inputs:
            bw.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.10
        for k in ['Transmission Weight', 'Transmission']:
            if k in bw.inputs:
                bw.inputs[k].default_value = 0.5
                break

    car_l = 20.0; car_w = 2.8; car_h = 3.6

    # 主车厢
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + car_h * 0.5 + 0.4))
    body = bpy.context.object; body.name = _NAME + '_body'
    body.scale = (car_l, car_w, car_h)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bv = body.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.10; bv.segments = 3
    body.data.materials.append(body_mat)

    # 腰部条纹（绿）
    for sy in [-1, 1]:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1] + sy * (car_w * 0.5 + 0.005), _LOC[2] + 1.6))
        st = bpy.context.object; st.name = _NAME + '_stripe'
        st.rotation_euler = (math.radians(90), 0, 0)
        st.scale = (car_l - 0.5, 0.40, 1.0)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=True)
        st.data.materials.append(stripe_mat)

    # 车窗（一排 8 个）
    win_count = 8
    win_w = (car_l - 4.0) / win_count
    for sy in [-1, 1]:
        for i in range(win_count):
            x = _LOC[0] - (car_l - 4.0) * 0.5 + i * win_w + win_w * 0.5
            bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(x, _LOC[1] + sy * (car_w * 0.5 + 0.01), _LOC[2] + 2.3))
            wn = bpy.context.object; wn.name = _NAME + '_window'
            wn.scale = (win_w * 0.78, 0.02, 0.80)
            bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
            wn.data.materials.append(window_mat)

    # 车门（中间双开）
    for sy in [-1, 1]:
        for sx in [-0.6, 0.6]:
            bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] + sx, _LOC[1] + sy * (car_w * 0.5 + 0.012), _LOC[2] + 1.6))
            dr = bpy.context.object; dr.name = _NAME + '_door'
            dr.scale = (0.55, 0.02, 1.8)
            bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
            dr.data.materials.append(stripe_mat)

    # 顶部受电弓（pantograph）
    metal = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_metal')
    metal.use_nodes = True
    bm = metal.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bm and 'Base Color' in bm.inputs:
        bm.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.30, 0.30, 0.32, 1.0)
    if bm and 'Metallic' in bm.inputs:
        bm.inputs['Metallic'].default_value = 0.7

    # 4 根斜杆 + 顶部横滑板
    panto_z = _LOC[2] + car_h + 0.4 + 0.5
    for sx in [-0.3, 0.3]:
        for sy in [-0.3, 0.3]:
            bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.025, depth=0.7, vertices=8, location=(_LOC[0] + sx * 2, _LOC[1] + sy, panto_z - 0.30))
            arm = bpy.context.object; arm.name = _NAME + '_panto_arm'
            arm.rotation_euler = (math.radians(20) * sy, math.radians(20) * sx, 0)
            arm.data.materials.append(metal)
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], panto_z))
    bar = bpy.context.object; bar.name = _NAME + '_panto_bar'
    bar.scale = (2.0, 0.8, 0.04)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bar.data.materials.append(metal)

    # 转向架（车底 2 个）
    for sx in [-car_l * 0.3, car_l * 0.3]:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] + sx, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + 0.2))
        bg = bpy.context.object; bg.name = _NAME + '_bogie'
        bg.scale = (2.0, car_w + 0.2, 0.4)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
        bg.data.materials.append(metal)
        # 2 对轮
        for ddx in [-0.7, 0.7]:
            for sy in [-1, 1]:
                bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.40, depth=0.10, vertices=20, location=(_LOC[0] + sx + ddx, _LOC[1] + sy * (car_w * 0.5 - 0.10), _LOC[2] + 0.40))
                w = bpy.context.object; w.name = _NAME + '_wheel'
                w.rotation_euler = (math.radians(90), 0, 0)
                bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=False)
                w.data.materials.append(metal)
    print('[apply_template] train_jr_one_car 完成')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] train_jr_one_car 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: truck_pickup

templates.description: 车头 cab（cube + 倾斜窗户） + 后侧货箱（cube 中空感简化为表面） + 4 大胎 + 前挡风玻璃。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _C = {{color|json}}

    body_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_body')
    body_mat.use_nodes = True
    b = body_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (_C[0], _C[1], _C[2], 1.0)
    if b and 'Metallic' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Metallic'].default_value = 0.3

    tire_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_tire')
    tire_mat.use_nodes = True
    bt = tire_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bt and 'Base Color' in bt.inputs:
        bt.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.05, 0.05, 0.05, 1.0)

    glass_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_glass')
    glass_mat.use_nodes = True
    bg = glass_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bg:
        if 'Base Color' in bg.inputs:
            bg.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.15, 0.25, 0.30, 1.0)
        if 'Roughness' in bg.inputs:
            bg.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.05
        for k in ['Transmission Weight', 'Transmission']:
            if k in bg.inputs:
                bg.inputs[k].default_value = 0.5
                break

    # 车头舱
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] + 0.7, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + 0.90))
    cab = bpy.context.object; cab.name = _NAME + '_cab'
    cab.scale = (1.5, 1.8, 1.4)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bv = cab.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.04; bv.segments = 2
    cab.data.materials.append(body_mat)

    # 货箱
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] - 1.2, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + 0.75))
    bed = bpy.context.object; bed.name = _NAME + '_bed'
    bed.scale = (2.2, 1.8, 1.1)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    bv = bed.modifiers.new('Bev', 'BEVEL'); bv.affect = 'EDGES'; bv.width = 0.04; bv.segments = 2
    bed.data.materials.append(body_mat)

    # 4 大轮
    for sx, sy in [(-1.5, -0.95), (1.0, -0.95), (-1.5, 0.95), (1.0, 0.95)]:
        bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.42, depth=0.25, vertices=20, location=(_LOC[0] + sx, _LOC[1] + sy, _LOC[2] + 0.42))
        w = bpy.context.object; w.name = _NAME + '_wheel'
        w.rotation_euler = (math.radians(90), 0, 0)
        bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=False)
        bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
        w.data.materials.append(tire_mat)

    # 前挡风
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] + 1.45, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + 1.40))
    gl = bpy.context.object; gl.name = _NAME + '_windshield'
    gl.rotation_euler = (math.radians(90), math.radians(60), 0)
    gl.scale = (0.6, 1.7, 1.0)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=True)
    gl.data.materials.append(glass_mat)
    print('[apply_template] truck_pickup 完成')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] truck_pickup 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: boat_small
templates.title: 小船（船体 + 桅杆 + 帆 + 内座位）
templates.description: 椭圆船体（UV sphere scaled + bisect 切掉上半）+ 中央桅杆 + 三角帆 plane。
templates.code:
import bpy, math
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _L = float({{length}})

    wood_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_wood')
    wood_mat.use_nodes = True
    b = wood_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.50, 0.35, 0.20, 1.0)

    sail_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_sail')
    sail_mat.use_nodes = True
    bs = sail_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if bs and 'Base Color' in bs.inputs:
        bs.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.95, 0.92, 0.85, 1.0)
    if bs and 'Roughness' in bs.inputs:
        bs.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.9

    # 船体
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_uv_sphere_add(radius=_L * 0.5, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + 0.25))
    hull = bpy.context.object; hull.name = _NAME + '_hull'
    hull.scale = (1.0, 0.35, 0.40)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)
    # 切掉上半
    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
    bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
    bpy.ops.mesh.bisect(plane_co=(0, 0, _LOC[2] + 0.30), plane_no=(0, 0, 1), use_fill=True, clear_outer=False, clear_inner=True)
    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')
    bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
    hull.data.materials.append(wood_mat)

    # 桅杆
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.03, depth=2.2, vertices=10, location=(_LOC[0], _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + 1.30))
    mast = bpy.context.object; mast.name = _NAME + '_mast'
    mast.data.materials.append(wood_mat)

    # 三角帆 plane
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=1, location=(_LOC[0] + 0.40, _LOC[1], _LOC[2] + 1.50))
    sail = bpy.context.object; sail.name = _NAME + '_sail'
    sail.rotation_euler = (math.radians(90), 0, math.radians(90))
    sail.scale = (1.2, 1.6, 1.0)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=True, scale=True)
    sail.data.materials.append(sail_mat)
    print('[apply_template] boat_small 完成')
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] boat_small 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: airplane_paper
templates.title: 纸飞机（多个三角 plane 拼成机身）
templates.description: 5~6 块三角形 plane 折叠成纸飞机形状，白色 / 米黄纸张材质。
templates.code:
import bpy, bmesh
try:
    _NAME = {{name|json}}
    _LOC = {{location|json}}
    _S = float({{size}})

    paper_mat = bpy.data.materials.new(_NAME + '_paper')
    paper_mat.use_nodes = True
    b = paper_mat.node_tree.nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
    if b and 'Base Color' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.95, 0.93, 0.88, 1.0)
    if b and 'Roughness' in b.inputs:
        b.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.85

    # 用 bmesh 直接搭一个简化纸飞机
    me = bpy.data.meshes.new(_NAME + '_mesh')
    obj = bpy.data.objects.new(_NAME, me)
    bpy.context.collection.objects.link(obj)
    obj.location = _LOC
    bm = bmesh.new()
    s = _S
    # 顶部中线
    v_nose = bm.verts.new((s, 0, 0))
    v_tail = bm.verts.new((-s, 0, 0))
    v_top = bm.verts.new((-s * 0.7, 0, s * 0.25))
    # 左右翼尖
    v_left = bm.verts.new((-s * 0.5, s * 0.8, -s * 0.1))
    v_right = bm.verts.new((-s * 0.5, -s * 0.8, -s * 0.1))
    bm.faces.new([v_nose, v_top, v_left])
    bm.faces.new([v_nose, v_top, v_right])
    bm.faces.new([v_nose, v_left, v_tail])
    bm.faces.new([v_nose, v_tail, v_right])
    bm.faces.new([v_top, v_left, v_tail])
    bm.faces.new([v_top, v_tail, v_right])
    bm.to_mesh(me); bm.free()
    obj.data.materials.append(paper_mat)
    so = obj.modifiers.new('Solid', 'SOLIDIFY'); so.thickness = 0.002
    print('[apply_template] airplane_paper 完成: size=' + str(_S))
except Exception as _e:
    import traceback; print('[apply_template] airplane_paper 失败:', _e); traceback.print_exc()

templates.name: uv_smart_project
templates.title: 智能 UV 拆分（最常用 · 适合大多数物体）
templates.description: 用 Blender 内置 Smart UV Project（按角度阈值自动切割 + 紧凑排布），适合大多数有机/硬表面物体

params.name: angle_limit_deg
params.description: 切缝角度阈值，0~89，越小切缝越多 UV 越分散

params.name: island_margin
params.description: UV 岛之间留白（0~0.5），过小会导致烘焙互染

params.name: area_weight
params.description: 面积权重 0~1，0=均匀，越大大面占越多

params.name: correct_aspect
params.description: 是否按贴图长宽比校正

templates.code:
import bpy
import math

_obj_name = {{object_name}}
obj = bpy.data.objects.get(_obj_name)
if obj is None or obj.type != 'MESH':
    raise Exception('对象不存在或不是 mesh: ' + str(_obj_name))

bpy.ops.object.select_all(action='DESELECT')
obj.hide_set(False)
obj.select_set(True)
bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = obj

if not obj.data.uv_layers:
    obj.data.uv_layers.new(name='UVMap')

bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
bpy.ops.uv.smart_project(
    angle_limit=math.radians({{angle_limit_deg}}),
    island_margin={{island_margin}},
    area_weight={{area_weight}},
    correct_aspect={{correct_aspect}},
    scale_to_bounds=False
)
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')
print('[uv_smart_project] ' + obj.name + ' -> ' + str(len(obj.data.uv_layers)) + ' UV layers')

templates.name: uv_cube_project

params.description: 投影 cube 边长，匹配物体的世界尺寸

templates.code:
import bpy

_obj_name = {{object_name}}
obj = bpy.data.objects.get(_obj_name)
if obj is None or obj.type != 'MESH':
    raise Exception('对象不存在或不是 mesh: ' + str(_obj_name))

bpy.ops.object.select_all(action='DESELECT')
obj.hide_set(False)
obj.select_set(True)
bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = obj

if not obj.data.uv_layers:
    obj.data.uv_layers.new(name='UVMap')

bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
bpy.ops.uv.cube_project(cube_size={{cube_size}}, correct_aspect=True, scale_to_bounds=False)
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

scale = {{scale_uv}}
if scale != 1.0:
    uv_layer = obj.data.uv_layers.active.data
    for loop in uv_layer:
        loop.uv.x *= scale
        loop.uv.y *= scale
print('[uv_cube_project] ' + obj.name + ' cube={{cube_size}} scale={{scale_uv}}')

templates.name: uv_unwrap_with_seams
templates.title: 按 mark seam 标准展开（最精细 · 角色/复杂硬表面）
templates.description: 传统 Unwrap（要求物体已有 mark_seam 切缝）。本模板会先按 edge_angle 阈值自动标 seam，再 unwrap。适合需要手动控制 UV 走向的精细物体

params.name: auto_seam_angle_deg
params.description: 自动标 seam 的角度阈值（0~89，越小切缝越多）

templates.code:
import bpy
import math

_obj_name = {{object_name}}
obj = bpy.data.objects.get(_obj_name)
if obj is None or obj.type != 'MESH':
    raise Exception('对象不存在或不是 mesh: ' + str(_obj_name))

bpy.ops.object.select_all(action='DESELECT')
obj.hide_set(False)
obj.select_set(True)
bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = obj

if not obj.data.uv_layers:
    obj.data.uv_layers.new(name='UVMap')

bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
bpy.ops.mesh.edges_select_sharp(sharpness=math.radians({{auto_seam_angle_deg}}))
bpy.ops.mesh.mark_seam(clear=False)
bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
try:
    bpy.ops.uv.unwrap(method='ANGLE_BASED', margin={{margin}}, correct_aspect=True)
except Exception as e:
    bpy.ops.uv.unwrap(method='ANGLE_BASED', margin={{margin}})
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')
print('[uv_unwrap_with_seams] ' + obj.name + ' angle={{auto_seam_angle_deg}}deg margin={{margin}}')

templates.name: uv_lightmap_pack
templates.title: Lightmap UV 第 2 层（烘焙光照贴图专用）
templates.description: 为已有 UVMap 的物体新增第 2 层 'Lightmap' UV（紧凑排布无重叠），用于光照烘焙。不会覆盖原有 UV0

params.name: lightmap_layer_name
params.description: 第 2 层 UV 命名

params.name: margin
params.description: UV 岛留白（光照烘焙建议略大些防溢出）

templates.code:
import bpy

_obj_name = {{object_name}}
obj = bpy.data.objects.get(_obj_name)
if obj is None or obj.type != 'MESH':
    raise Exception('对象不存在或不是 mesh: ' + str(_obj_name))

bpy.ops.object.select_all(action='DESELECT')
obj.hide_set(False)
obj.select_set(True)
bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = obj

_lm_name = {{lightmap_layer_name}}
if _lm_name in obj.data.uv_layers:
    obj.data.uv_layers.remove(obj.data.uv_layers[_lm_name])
lm = obj.data.uv_layers.new(name=_lm_name)
lm.active = True

bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
bpy.ops.uv.lightmap_pack(
    PREF_CONTEXT='ALL_FACES',
    PREF_PACK_IN_ONE=True,
    PREF_NEW_UVLAYER=False,
    PREF_APPLY_IMAGE=False,
    PREF_BOX_DIV=12,
    PREF_MARGIN_DIV={{margin}}
)
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')
print('[uv_lightmap_pack] ' + obj.name + ' added UV layer ' + _lm_name)

templates.name: apply_pbr_material
templates.title: 一键应用 PBR 贴图组（接 BSDF + Normal Map + Displacement）⭐
templates.description: 把通过 search_polyhaven_textures + 下载得到的本地贴图路径自动建成 PBR 材质节点链：Image Texture × N → Normal Map → Principled BSDF → Material Output（含 Displacement）。粗模 + 这个贴图，几乎能以假乱真

params.name: diffuse_path
params.description: Diffuse / Color 贴图本地路径（必填）

params.name: roughness_path
params.description: Roughness 贴图本地路径，可空

params.name: metallic_path
params.description: Metallic 贴图本地路径，可空

params.name: displacement_path
params.description: Displacement / 深度贴图本地路径，可空

params.name: ao_path
params.description: AO 贴图本地路径，可空（叠到 diffuse 上）

params.name: uv_scale
params.description: UV 缩放倍率（>1 重复 / <1 拉伸）

params.name: displacement_strength
params.description: 位移强度（粗模禁用 Adaptive Subdivision 时只是 bump effect）

templates.code:
import bpy
import os
import math

_obj_name = {{object_name}}
obj = bpy.data.objects.get(_obj_name)
if obj is None or obj.type != 'MESH':
    raise Exception('对象不存在或不是 mesh: ' + str(_obj_name))

diffuse_path = {{diffuse_path}}
if not diffuse_path or not os.path.exists(diffuse_path):
    raise Exception('diffuse_path 必填且文件需存在: ' + str(diffuse_path))

mat_name = {{material_name}}
mat = bpy.data.materials.get(mat_name)
if mat is None:
    mat = bpy.data.materials.new(name=mat_name)
mat.use_nodes = True
nt = mat.node_tree
nt.nodes.clear()

output = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeOutputMaterial'); output.location = (600, 0)
bsdf = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeBsdfPrincipled');    bsdf.location = (300, 0)
nt.links.new(bsdf.outputs[0], output.inputs[0])

uv_node = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeUVMap');          uv_node.location = (-1000, 0)
mapping = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeMapping');        mapping.location = (-800, 0)
uv_scale = {{uv_scale}}
mapping.inputs['Scale'].default_value = (uv_scale, uv_scale, uv_scale)
nt.links.new(uv_node.outputs[0], mapping.inputs[0])

def load_image(path, non_color=False):
    if not path or not os.path.exists(path):
        return None
    img = bpy.data.images.load(path, check_existing=True)
    if non_color:
        try: img.colorspace_settings.name = 'Non-Color'
        except Exception: pass
    return img

diff_img = load_image(diffuse_path, non_color=False)
tex_diff = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexImage'); tex_diff.location = (-500, 300); tex_diff.image = diff_img
nt.links.new(mapping.outputs[0], tex_diff.inputs[0])
ao_path = {{ao_path}}
if ao_path and os.path.exists(ao_path):
    ao_img = load_image(ao_path, non_color=True)
    tex_ao = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexImage'); tex_ao.location = (-500, 100); tex_ao.image = ao_img
    nt.links.new(mapping.outputs[0], tex_ao.inputs[0])
    mix = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeMixRGB'); mix.location = (-100, 250); mix.blend_type = 'MULTIPLY'; mix.inputs['Fac'].default_value = 1.0
    nt.links.new(tex_diff.outputs[0], mix.inputs[1])
    nt.links.new(tex_ao.outputs[0], mix.inputs[2])
    nt.links.new(mix.outputs[0], bsdf.inputs['Base Color'])
else:
    nt.links.new(tex_diff.outputs[0], bsdf.inputs['Base Color'])

rough_path = {{roughness_path}}
if rough_path and os.path.exists(rough_path):
    rough_img = load_image(rough_path, non_color=True)
    tex_rough = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexImage'); tex_rough.location = (-500, -100); tex_rough.image = rough_img
    nt.links.new(mapping.outputs[0], tex_rough.inputs[0])
    nt.links.new(tex_rough.outputs[0], bsdf.inputs['Roughness'])

metal_path = {{metallic_path}}
if metal_path and os.path.exists(metal_path):
    metal_img = load_image(metal_path, non_color=True)
    tex_metal = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexImage'); tex_metal.location = (-500, -300); tex_metal.image = metal_img
    nt.links.new(mapping.outputs[0], tex_metal.inputs[0])
    nt.links.new(tex_metal.outputs[0], bsdf.inputs['Metallic'])

normal_path = {{normal_path}}
if normal_path and os.path.exists(normal_path):
    normal_img = load_image(normal_path, non_color=True)
    tex_normal = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexImage'); tex_normal.location = (-500, -500); tex_normal.image = normal_img
    nt.links.new(mapping.outputs[0], tex_normal.inputs[0])
    nm = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeNormalMap'); nm.location = (-100, -500)
    nt.links.new(tex_normal.outputs[0], nm.inputs['Color'])
    nt.links.new(nm.outputs[0], bsdf.inputs['Normal'])

disp_path = {{displacement_path}}
if disp_path and os.path.exists(disp_path):
    disp_img = load_image(disp_path, non_color=True)
    tex_disp = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexImage'); tex_disp.location = (-500, -700); tex_disp.image = disp_img
    nt.links.new(mapping.outputs[0], tex_disp.inputs[0])
    disp_node = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeDisplacement'); disp_node.location = (300, -300)
    disp_node.inputs['Scale'].default_value = {{displacement_strength}}
    nt.links.new(tex_disp.outputs[0], disp_node.inputs['Height'])
    nt.links.new(disp_node.outputs[0], output.inputs['Displacement'])

if obj.data.materials:
    obj.data.materials[0] = mat
else:
    obj.data.materials.append(mat)

if not obj.data.uv_layers:
    bpy.ops.object.select_all(action='DESELECT')
    obj.hide_set(False); obj.select_set(True); bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = obj
    obj.data.uv_layers.new(name='UVMap')
    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
    bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
    bpy.ops.uv.smart_project(angle_limit=math.radians(66), island_margin=0.02)
    bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

print('[apply_pbr_material] ' + obj.name + ' <- ' + mat.name + ' (uv_scale={{uv_scale}})')

templates.name: apply_hdri_environment
templates.title: 一键应用 HDRI 环境光（World shader）⭐
templates.description: 把通过 search_polyhaven_hdris + 下载得到的本地 .hdr/.exr 文件设为世界环境光：Environment Texture → Background → World Output。可控旋转、强度、是否在背景显示

params.name: hdri_path
params.description: 本地 .hdr/.exr 文件绝对路径（必填）

params.name: rotation_z_deg
params.description: 环境绕 Z 轴旋转角度（控制太阳方向）

params.name: show_in_background
params.description: 是否在渲染图背景显示 HDRI（关掉=透明背景）

templates.code:
import bpy
import os
import math

hdri_path = {{hdri_path}}
if not hdri_path or not os.path.exists(hdri_path):
    raise Exception('hdri_path 必填且文件需存在: ' + str(hdri_path))

world = bpy.context.scene.world
if world is None:
    world = bpy.data.worlds.new(name='World')
    bpy.context.scene.world = world
world.use_nodes = True
nt = world.node_tree
nt.nodes.clear()

output = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeOutputWorld');        output.location = (600, 0)
bg = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeBackground');             bg.location = (300, 0)
bg.inputs['Strength'].default_value = {{strength}}
nt.links.new(bg.outputs[0], output.inputs[0])

env = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexEnvironment');        env.location = (0, 0)
img = bpy.data.images.load(hdri_path, check_existing=True)
env.image = img
nt.links.new(env.outputs[0], bg.inputs[0])

mapping = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeMapping');           mapping.location = (-300, 0)
mapping.inputs['Rotation'].default_value = (0, 0, math.radians({{rotation_z_deg}}))
nt.links.new(mapping.outputs[0], env.inputs[0])

tc = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexCoord');                tc.location = (-600, 0)
nt.links.new(tc.outputs['Generated'], mapping.inputs[0])

bpy.context.scene.render.film_transparent = not {{show_in_background}}
print('[apply_hdri_environment] ' + os.path.basename(hdri_path) + ' strength={{strength}} rot_z={{rotation_z_deg}}deg')
